mapper.sql:
FROM TWORK_INFO_IVST_YYMM1 TO1 INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CT T_CT ON T_CT.CTKEY = TO1.CTKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_OW T_OW ON T_OW.OWKEY = TO1.OWKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC T_IC ON T_IC.CTKEY = TO1.CTKEY AND T_IC.OWKEY = TO1.OWKEY AND T_IC.ICKEY = TO1.ICKEY
AND #{SEARCH_CONDITION}
mapper.insert:
/* wms-report-icReceiptSearch-sql-oracle.xml - insertIcSetReceiptIvClose */ INSERT INTO TWORK_INFO_IVST3( CLOSING_TYPE /* 마감 유형 */ , CLOSING_DATE /* 마감 일자 */ , CTKEY /* 센터 코드 */ , OWKEY /* 화주 코드 */ , ICKEY /* 물품 코드 */ , IVATKEY /* 재고 속성 코드 */ , LOGGRPCD /* 상저온 코드 */ , ICGRKEY /* 상품 그룹 코드 */ , STORE_KEY /* 점포 코드 */ , CARRYOVER_QTY /* 전일 재고 */ , CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE /* 전일 재고 원가 */ , CARRYOVER_SALEPRICE /* 전일 재고 총 판매가 */ , CLOSING_INVQTY /* 마감 재고 수량 */ , CLOSING_COSTPRICE /* 마감 재고 원가 */ , CLOSING_SALEPRICE /* 마감 재고 판매가 */ , ORHDTYPE /* 주문 공통 유형 */ , TTQTY /* 총 주문 원가 */ , TTQTY_COSTPRICE /* 총 주문 판매가 */ , TTQTY_SALEPRICE /* 총 입고 취소 수량 */ , TTIBCANCELQTY /* 총 조정 수량 */ , TTADJQTY , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY , DCKEY , CHITYMD , SUBULYMD , ICGRTYPE , TRUNC_COSTPRICE , DIFF_TTQTY , DIFF_TTQTY_COSTPRICE )
SELECT 'IV' , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{subulymd}, 'YYYYMMDD') - 1, 'YYYYMMDD') || '150000' , TO1.CTKEY , TO1.OWKEY , TO1.ICKEY , TO1.IVATKEY , TO1.LOGGRPCD , TO1.ICGRKEY , '' , 0 , 0 , 0 , COALESCE(TO1.CFQTY, 0) , COALESCE(TO1.COSTPRICE, 0) , COALESCE(TO1.SALEPRICE, 0) , TO1.SP_HDTYPE , 0 , 0 , 0 , 0 , 0 , #{sysdate} , #{surkey} , #{sysdate} , #{surkey} , '' , '' , #{subulymd} , TO1.ICGRTYPE , 0 , 0 , 0 FROM ( SELECT A.CTKEY , A.OWKEY , A.ICKEY , A.IVATKEY , A.LOGGRPCD , A.ICGRKEY , A.SP_HDTYPE , SUM(COALESCE(CASE SP_HDTYPE WHEN '018' THEN A.CFQTY ELSE A.CFQTY * (-1) END, 0)) AS CFQTY , SUM(TRUNC(COALESCE(CASE SP_HDTYPE WHEN '018' THEN A.CFQTY * A.COSTPRICE ELSE (A.CFQTY * A.COSTPRICE) * (-1) END, 0))) AS COSTPRICE , SUM(TRUNC(COALESCE(CASE SP_HDTYPE WHEN '018' THEN A.CFQTY * A.SALEPRICE ELSE (A.CFQTY * A.SALEPRICE) * (-1) END, 0))) AS SALEPRICE , A.ICGRTYPE FROM TWORK_INFO_SP_HD A INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = B.ICKEY WHERE A.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.WKSTATUS = '90' AND A.SPCONFIRMDATE BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{subulymd}, 'YYYYMMDD') - 1, 'YYYYMMDD') || '150000' AND #{subulymd} || '145959' GROUP BY A.CTKEY , A.OWKEY , A.ICKEY , A.IVATKEY , A.LOGGRPCD , A.ICGRKEY , A.SP_HDTYPE , A.ICGRTYPE
UNION ALL
SELECT B.CTKEY , B.OWKEY , B.ICKEY , ( SELECT IVATKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_IVATXLCXULC E WHERE E.LCKEY = 'WORKIN' AND E.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND E.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND E.ICKEY = B.ICKEY) AS IVATKEY , A.LOGGRPCD , B.ICGRKEY , A.SP_HDTYPE , SUM(COALESCE(CASE SP_HDTYPE WHEN '019' THEN B.CFQTY ELSE B.CFQTY * (-1) END, 0)) AS CFQTY , SUM(COALESCE(CASE SP_HDTYPE WHEN '019' THEN B.CFQTY * B.COSTPRICE ELSE (B.CFQTY * B.COSTPRICE) * (-1) END, 0)) AS COSTPRICE , SUM(COALESCE(CASE SP_HDTYPE WHEN '019' THEN B.CFQTY * B.SALEPRICE ELSE (B.CFQTY * B.SALEPRICE) * (-1) END, 0)) AS SALEPRICE , B.ICGRTYPE FROM TWORK_INFO_SP_HD A INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_SP_DT B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.SP_HDKEY = B.SP_HDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC C ON B.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND B.OWKEY = C.OWKEY AND B.ICKEY = C.ICKEY WHERE A.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.WKSTATUS = '90' AND A.SPCONFIRMDATE BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{subulymd}, 'YYYYMMDD') - 1, 'YYYYMMDD') || '150000' AND #{subulymd} || '145959' GROUP BY B.CTKEY , B.OWKEY , B.ICKEY , A.LOGGRPCD , B.ICGRKEY , A.SP_HDTYPE , B.ICGRTYPE ) TO1

INSERT INTO TWORK_INFO_IVST3 ( CLOSING_TYPE ,CLOSING_DATE ,CTKEY ,OWKEY ,ICKEY ,IVATKEY ,LOGGRPCD ,ICGRKEY ,STORE_KEY ,CARRYOVER_QTY ,CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE ,CARRYOVER_SALEPRICE ,CLOSING_INVQTY ,CLOSING_COSTPRICE ,CLOSING_SALEPRICE ,ORHDTYPE ,TTQTY ,TTQTY_COSTPRICE ,TTQTY_SALEPRICE ,TTIBCANCELQTY ,TTADJQTY ,INSERTDATE ,INSERTURKEY ,UPDATEDATE ,UPDATEURKEY ,DCKEY ,CHITYMD ,SUBULYMD ,ICGRTYPE ,TRUNC_COSTPRICE ,DIFF_TTQTY ,DIFF_TTQTY_COSTPRICE ) SELECT 'IV' ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{subulymd},'YYYYMMDD')-1,'YYYYMMDD')||'150000' ,A.CTKEY ,A.OWKEY ,A.ICKEY ,A.IVATKEY ,A.LOGGRPCD ,A.ICGRKEY ,'' ,0 AS CARRYOVER_QTY ,0 AS CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE ,0 AS CARRYOVER_SALEPRICE ,CLOSING_INVQTY ,CLOSING_SALEPRICE ,CLOSING_COSTPRICE ,'70' ,0 ,0 ,0 ,0 ,0 , #{sysdate} , #{surkey} , #{sysdate} , #{surkey}
,'' ,'' ,#{subulymd} ,'CATEGORY' AS ICGRTYPE ,0 ,0 ,0 FROM ( SELECT A.CTKEY ,A.OWKEY ,A.LOGGRPCD ,A.TA_HDKEY ,A.ICKEY ,E.TO_IVATKEY AS IVATKEY ,A.ICGRKEY ,COALESCE(SUM(A.INVNQTY), 0) - COALESCE(SUM(A.CLOSING_INVQTY), 0) AS CLOSING_INVQTY ,TRUNC(SUM(COALESCE(A.INVNQTY, 0) * COALESCE(C.AVGCOSTPRICE, B.COSTPRICE))) - TRUNC(SUM(A.CLOSING_INVQTY * COALESCE(C.AVGCOSTPRICE, B.COSTPRICE))) AS CLOSING_SALEPRICE ,TRUNC(SUM(COALESCE(A.INVNQTY, 0) * B.COSTPRICE)) - TRUNC(SUM(A.CLOSING_INVQTY * B.COSTPRICE )) AS CLOSING_COSTPRICE FROM ( SELECT A.CTKEY ,A.OWKEY ,A.TA_HDKEY ,A.LOGGRPCD ,A.ICKEY ,A.ICGRKEY ,A.CLOSING_INVQTY ,A.CLOSING_COSTPRICE ,0 AS INVNQTY FROM TWORK_INFO_PYSC_IVST A WHERE CRE_DATE BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{subulymd},'YYYYMMDD') - 1,'YYYYMMDD') || '150000' AND #{subulymd} || '145959' AND TA_HDKEY NOT LIKE 'BACK%' AND A.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND A.OWKEY = #{owkey} UNION ALL SELECT A.CTKEY ,A.OWKEY ,B.TA_HDKEY ,A.LOGGRPCD ,C.ICKEY ,C.ICGRKEY ,0 AS CLOSING_INVQTY ,0 AS CLOSING_COSTPRICE ,SUM(A.QTY) AS INVNQTY FROM TWORK_INFO_TA_DT A ,TWORK_INFO_TA_HD B ,TWORK_MST_PYSC_IC C WHERE A.TA_HDKEY = B.TA_HDKEY AND A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.TA_DTTYPE ='70' AND B.CYCLETYP = '10' AND A.WKSTATUS = '91' AND A.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = C.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = C.ICKEY AND B.CYCLEFR BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{subulymd},'YYYYMMDD') - 1,'YYYYMMDD') || '150000' AND #{subulymd} || '145959' AND C.CRE_DATE BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{subulymd},'YYYYMMDD') - 1,'YYYYMMDD') || '150000' AND #{subulymd} || '145959' AND A.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND A.OWKEY = #{owkey} GROUP BY C.ICKEY ,C.ICNAME ,C.ICGRKEY ,A.CTKEY ,B.TA_HDKEY ,A.OWKEY ,A.LOGGRPCD ) A ,TWORK_MST_PYSC_IC B LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_PYSC_AVGCOST C ON A.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = C.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = C.ICKEY AND A.ICGRKEY = C.ICGRKEY AND A.TA_HDKEY = C.TA_HDKEY ,TWORK_INFO_TA_HD D ,TWORK_INFO_TA_DT E WHERE A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = B.ICKEY AND B.CRE_DATE BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{subulymd},'YYYYMMDD') - 1,'YYYYMMDD') || '150000' AND #{subulymd} || '145959' AND A.CTKEY = D.CTKEY AND A.TA_HDKEY = D.TA_HDKEY AND D.WKSTATUS = '91' AND D.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND D.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND D.CTKEY = E.CTKEY AND D.OWKEY = E.OWKEY AND D.TA_HDKEY = E.TA_HDKEY GROUP BY A.CTKEY ,A.LOGGRPCD ,A.TA_HDKEY ,A.ICKEY ,E.TO_IVATKEY ,A.ICGRKEY ,A.OWKEY ) A

/* wms-report-icReceiptSearch-sql-oracle.xml - insertIcReceiptIvClose2 */ INSERT INTO TWORK_INFO_IVST3( CLOSING_TYPE /* 마감 유형 */ , CLOSING_DATE /* 마감 일자 */ , CTKEY /* 센터 코드 */ , OWKEY /* 화주 코드 */ , ICKEY /* 물품 코드 */ , IVATKEY /* 재고 속성 코드 */ , LOGGRPCD /* 상저온 코드 */ , ICGRKEY /* 상품 그룹 코드 */ , STORE_KEY /* 점포 코드 */ , CARRYOVER_QTY /* 전일 재고 */ , CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE /* 전일 재고 원가 */ , CARRYOVER_SALEPRICE /* 전일 재고 총 판매 */ , CLOSING_INVQTY /* 마감 재고 수량 */ , CLOSING_COSTPRICE /* 마감 재고 원가 */ , CLOSING_SALEPRICE /* 마감 재고 판매가 */ , ORHDTYPE /* 주문 공통 유형 */ , TTQTY /* 총 주문 원가 */ , TTQTY_COSTPRICE /* 총 주문 판매가 */ , TTQTY_SALEPRICE /* 총 입고 취소 수량 */ , TTIBCANCELQTY /* 총 조정 수량 */ , TTADJQTY , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY , DCKEY , CHITYMD , SUBULYMD , ICGRTYPE , TRUNC_COSTPRICE , DIFF_TTQTY , DIFF_TTQTY_COSTPRICE ) SELECT TO1.CLOSING_TYPE /* 마감 유형 */ , #{subulymd} || '000000' /* 마감 유형 */ , TO1.CTKEY /* 센터 코드 */ , TO1.OWKEY /* 화주 코드 */ , TO1.ICKEY /* 물품 코드 */ , TO1.IVATKEY , TO1.LOGGRPCD /* 상저온 코드 */ , TO1.ICGRKEY /* 상품 그룹 코드 */ , '' , TO1.CARRYOVER_QTY , TO1.CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE , 0 , TO1.CARRYOVER_QTY + TO1.IBTT_QTY - TO1.OBTT_QTY + TO1.IV_CON_QTY AS CLOSING_IVQTY , TO1.CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE + TO1.IBTT_COSTPRICE - OBTT_COSTPRICE + TO1.IV_CON_COSTPRICE AS CLOSING_COSTPRICE , 0 , 'UNK' , 0 , 0 , 0 , 0 , 0 , #{sysdate} , #{surkey} , #{sysdate} , #{surkey} , '1' , '' , #{subulymd} , TO1.ICGRTYPE , 0 , 0 , 0 FROM ( SELECT 'IV' AS CLOSING_TYPE /* 마감 유형 */ , TO1.CTKEY /* 센터 코드 */ , TO1.OWKEY /* 화주 코드 */ , TO1.ICKEY /* 물품 코드 */ , TO1.IVATKEY , TO1.LOGGRPCD /* 상저온 코드 */ , TO1.ICGRKEY /* 상품 그룹 코드 */ , TO1.ICGRTYPE , TO1.EX_DATE , COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(CLOSING_INVQTY) FROM TWORK_INFO_IVST3 A WHERE CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND CTKEY = TO1.CTKEY AND OWKEY = TO1.OWKEY AND ICKEY = TO1.ICKEY AND IVATKEY = TO1.IVATKEY AND CLOSING_DATE = TO1.EX_DATE), 0) AS CARRYOVER_QTY , COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(CLOSING_COSTPRICE) FROM TWORK_INFO_IVST3 A WHERE CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND CTKEY = TO1.CTKEY AND OWKEY = TO1.OWKEY AND ICKEY = TO1.ICKEY AND IVATKEY = TO1.IVATKEY AND CLOSING_DATE = TO1.EX_DATE), 0) AS CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE , SUM(TO1.IBTT_QTY) AS IBTT_QTY , SUM(TO1.OBTT_QTY) AS OBTT_QTY , SUM(TO1.IV_CON_QTY) AS IV_CON_QTY , SUM(TO1.IBTT_COSTPRICE) AS IBTT_COSTPRICE , SUM(OBTT_COSTPRICE) AS OBTT_COSTPRICE , SUM(TO1.IV_CON_COSTPRICE) AS IV_CON_COSTPRICE FROM ( SELECT TT1.CLOSING_TYPE /* 마감 유형 */ , TT1.CLOSING_DATE /* 마감 일자 */ , TT1.CTKEY /* 센터 코드 */ , TT1.OWKEY /* 화주 코드 */ , TT1.ICKEY /* 물품 코드 */ , TT1.IVATKEY , TT1.LOGGRPCD /* 상저온 코드 */ , TT1.ICGRKEY /* 상품 그룹 코드 */ , TT1.ICGRTYPE , ( SELECT MAX(B.CLOSING_DATE) FROM TWORK_INFO_IVST3 B WHERE B.CTKEY = TT1.CTKEY AND B.OWKEY = TT1.OWKEY AND B.ICKEY = TT1.ICKEY AND B.IVATKEY = TT1.IVATKEY AND B.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND B.CLOSING_DATE < TT1.CLOSING_DATE) AS EX_DATE
, TT1.CARRYOVER_QTY , TT1.CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE , TT1.IBTT_QTY , TT1.IBTT_COSTPRICE , TT1.OBTT_QTY , TRUNC(TT1.OBTT_QTY) AS OBTT_COSTPRICE /* 출고 금액 */ , TT1.IV_CON_QTY , TT1.IV_CON_COSTPRICE FROM ( SELECT TT1.CLOSING_TYPE /* 마감 유형 */ , TT1.CLOSING_DATE /* 마감 일자 */ , TT1.CTKEY /* 센터 코드 */ , TT1.OWKEY /* 화주 코드 */ , TT1.ICKEY /* 물품 코드 */ , TT1.IVATKEY , TT1.LOGGRPCD /* 상저온 코드 */ , TT1.ICGRKEY /* 상품 그룹 코드 */ , TT1.ICGRTYPE , 0 AS CARRYOVER_QTY , 0 AS CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE , (TT1.ACIB_QTY + TT1.OI_QTY) - TT1.ACOB_QTY AS IBTT_QTY , TT1.ACIB_COSTPRICE + TT1.OI_COSTPRICE - TT1.ACOB_COSTPRICE AS IBTT_COSTPRICE , (TT1.STOB_QTY - TT1.STRI_QTY + TT1.SCO_QTY + TT1.OO_QTY + TT1.DUOB_QTY + TT1.DNOB_QTY + TT1.DPOB_QTY + (TT1.IC_REPLACE_QTY * -1)) AS OBTT_QTY , TT1.IV_CON_QTY , TT1.IV_CON_COSTPRICE FROM ( SELECT A.CLOSING_TYPE /* 마감 유형 */ , A.CLOSING_DATE /* 마감 일자 */ , A.CTKEY /* 센터 코드 */ , A.OWKEY /* 화주 코드 */ , A.ICKEY /* 물품 코드 */ , A.IVATKEY , A.LOGGRPCD /* 상저온 코드 */ , A.ICGRKEY /* 상품 그룹 코드 */ , A.ICGRTYPE , A.STORE_KEY , CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '10' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '100' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '200') THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS ACIB_QTY /* 거래처 입고 수량 */ , CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '10' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '100' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '200') THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS ACIB_COSTPRICE /* 거래처 입고 금액 */ , CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '40' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '90' THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS ACOB_QTY /* 거래처 반출 수량 */ , CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '40' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '90' THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS ACOB_COSTPRICE /* 거래처 반출 금액 */ , CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '60' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '90' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '180' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '120') THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS OI_QTY /* 기타 입고 수량 */ , CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '60' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '90' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '180' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '120') THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS OI_COSTPRICE /* 기타 입고 금액 */ , CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '10' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '20' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '30' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '60' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '70' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '910' OR ORHDTYPE = '200' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '300' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '310') THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS STOB_QTY /* 점포 출고 수량 */ , CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '10' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '20' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '30' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '60' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '70' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '910' OR ORHDTYPE = '200' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '300' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '310') THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS STOB_COSTPRICE /* 점포 출고 금액 */ , CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '50' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '950' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '190') THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS STRI_QTY /* 점포 반입 수량 */ , CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '50' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '950' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '190') THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS STRI_COSTPRICE /* 점포 반입 금액 */ , CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '10' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '20' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '30' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '40' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '50' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '60' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '70' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '910' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '200') THEN A.TTQTY_SALEPRICE ELSE 0 END AS STOB_SALEPRICE /* 점포 출고 매가 */ , CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '50' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '950') THEN A.TTQTY_SALEPRICE ELSE 0 END AS STRI_SALEPRICE /* 점포 반입 매가 */ , CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '120' THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS DUOB_QTY /* 폐기 수량 */ , CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '120' THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS DUOB_COSTPRICE /* 폐기 금액 */ , CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '120' THEN A.TTQTY_SALEPRICE ELSE 0 END AS DUOB_SALEPRICE /* 폐기 매가 */ , CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '110' THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS DNOB_QTY /* 기부 수량 */ , CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '110' THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS DNOB_COSTPRICE /* 기부 금액 */ , CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '110' THEN A.TTQTY_SALEPRICE ELSE 0 END AS DNOB_SALEPRICE /* 기부 매가 */ , CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '130' THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS DPOB_QTY /* 매각 수량 */ , CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '130' THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS DPOB_COSTPRICE /* 매각 금액 */ , CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '80' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '100' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '140' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '180' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '50') THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS OO_QTY /* 기타 출고 수량 */ , CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '80' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '100' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '140' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '180' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '50') THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS OO_COSTPRICE /* 기타 출고 금액 */ , CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '190' THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS SCO_QTY /* 자가 소비 수량 */ , CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '190' THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS SCO_COSTPRICE /* 자가 소비 금액 */ , CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '018' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '019') THEN A.CLOSING_INVQTY ELSE 0 END AS IC_REPLACE_QTY /* 상품 대체 수량 */ , CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '018' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '019') THEN A.CLOSING_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS IC_REPLACE_COSTPRICE /* 상품 대체 금액 */ , CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '70' THEN A.CLOSING_INVQTY ELSE 0 END AS IV_CON_QTY /* 재고 반영 수량 */ , CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '70' THEN A.CLOSING_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS IV_CON_COSTPRICE /* 재고 반영 금액 */ , A.TRUNC_COSTPRICE /* 원가 정산 금액 */ , A.DCKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_IVST3 A WHERE A.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.CLOSING_DATE = #{subulymd}|| '000000' ) TT1
UNION ALL
SELECT TT2.CLOSING_TYPE /* 마감 유형 */ , TT2.CLOSING_DATE /* 마감 일자 */ , TT2.CTKEY /* 센터 코드 */ , TT2.OWKEY /* 화주 코드 */ , TT2.ICKEY /* 물품 코드 */ , TT2.IVATKEY , TT2.LOGGRPCD /* 상저온 코드 */ , TT2.ICGRKEY /* 상품 그룹 코드 */ , TT2.ICGRTYPE , TT2.CLOSING_INVQTY AS CARRYOVER_QTY , TT2.CLOSING_COSTPRICE AS CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE , 0 AS IBTT_QTY , 0 AS IBTT_COSTPRICE , 0 AS OBTT_QTY , 0 AS IV_CON_QTY , 0 AS IV_CON_COSTPRICE FROM TWORK_INFO_IVST3 TT2 WHERE TT2.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND TT2.CLOSING_DATE = #{subulymd}|| '150000' AND TT2.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND TT2.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND TT2.ORHDTYPE = 'UNK' ) TT1 ) TO1 GROUP BY TO1.CTKEY /* 센터 코드 */ , TO1.OWKEY /* 화주 코드 */ , TO1.ICKEY /* 물품 코드 */ , TO1.IVATKEY , TO1.LOGGRPCD /* 상저온 코드 */ , TO1.ICGRKEY /* 상품 그룹 코드 */ , TO1.ICGRTYPE , TO1.EX_DATE ) TO1

/* wms-report-icReceiptSearch-sql-oracle.xml - insertIvReceiptIvClose3 */ INSERT INTO TWORK_INFO_IVST1 ( CLOSING_TYPE ,CLOSING_DATE ,CTKEY ,OWKEY ,ICKEY ,LOGGRPCD ,ICGRKEY ,STORE_KEY ,CARRYOVER_QTY ,CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE ,CARRYOVER_SALEPRICE ,CLOSING_INVQTY ,CLOSING_COSTPRICE ,CLOSING_SALEPRICE ,ORHDTYPE ,TTQTY ,TTQTY_COSTPRICE ,TTQTY_SALEPRICE ,TTIBCANCELQTY ,TTADJQTY ,INSERTDATE ,INSERTURKEY ,UPDATEDATE ,UPDATEURKEY ,DCKEY ,CHITYMD ,SUBULYMD ,ICGRTYPE ,TRUNC_COSTPRICE ,DIFF_TTQTY ,DIFF_TTQTY_COSTPRICE )
WITH T_CAL AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(dt_val, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DT FROM generate_series( TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{subulymd},1,6), 'YYYYMM'), TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{subulymd},1,6), 'YYYYMM') + (CAST(SUBSTR(#{subulymd},7,2) AS INTEGER) - 1), INTERVAL '1 day' ) AS dt_val ) , T_DAT AS ( SELECT SUBSTR(A.CLOSING_DATE,1,8) AS SUBUL_YMD, A.* FROM TWORK_INFO_IVST1 A WHERE CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND ORHDTYPE = 'UNK' AND CLOSING_DATE BETWEEN SUBSTR(#{subulymd},1,6) || '01' || '000000' AND #{subulymd} || '235959' AND CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} ) , TMP_CAL AS ( SELECT DISTINCT DT, CTKEY ,OWKEY ,ICKEY ,LOGGRPCD ,ICGRKEY ,CARRYOVER_QTY ,CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE ,CARRYOVER_SALEPRICE ,CLOSING_INVQTY ,CLOSING_COSTPRICE ,CLOSING_SALEPRICE ,ORHDTYPE ,TTQTY ,TTQTY_COSTPRICE ,TTQTY_SALEPRICE ,TTIBCANCELQTY ,TTADJQTY ,INSERTDATE ,INSERTURKEY ,UPDATEDATE ,UPDATEURKEY ,CHITYMD ,DCKEY ,SUBULYMD ,ICGRTYPE ,TRUNC_COSTPRICE ,DIFF_TTQTY ,DIFF_TTQTY_COSTPRICE ,TAXYN ,CTGKEY FROM (SELECT DISTINCT CTKEY ,OWKEY ,ICKEY ,LOGGRPCD ,ICGRKEY ,CARRYOVER_QTY ,CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE ,CARRYOVER_SALEPRICE ,CLOSING_INVQTY ,CLOSING_COSTPRICE ,CLOSING_SALEPRICE ,ORHDTYPE ,TTQTY ,TTQTY_COSTPRICE ,TTQTY_SALEPRICE ,TTIBCANCELQTY ,TTADJQTY ,INSERTDATE ,INSERTURKEY ,UPDATEDATE ,UPDATEURKEY ,CHITYMD ,DCKEY ,SUBULYMD ,ICGRTYPE ,TRUNC_COSTPRICE ,DIFF_TTQTY ,DIFF_TTQTY_COSTPRICE ,TAXYN ,CTGKEY FROM T_DAT) B, (SELECT DT FROM T_CAL) A ) SELECT DISTINCT 'IVS' AS CLOSING_TYPE ,CASE WHEN CLOSING_DATE IS NULL THEN A.DT||'000000' ELSE CLOSING_DATE END AS CLOSING_DATE ,A.CTKEY ,A.OWKEY ,A.ICKEY ,A.LOGGRPCD ,A.ICGRKEY ,'' ,COALESCE((SELECT SUM(CLOSING_INVQTY) FROM TWORK_INFO_IVST1 AA WHERE CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND SUBSTR(CLOSING_DATE,1,8) = (SELECT SUBSTR(MAX(B.CLOSING_DATE),1,8) FROM TWORK_INFO_IVST1 B WHERE B.CTKEY = A.CTKEY AND B.OWKEY = A.OWKEY AND B.ICKEY = A.ICKEY AND B.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND B.CLOSING_DATE < A.DT ) AND CTKEY = A.CTKEY AND OWKEY = A.OWKEY AND ICKEY = A.ICKEY AND LOGGRPCD = A.LOGGRPCD),0) AS CARRYOVER_QTY ,COALESCE((SELECT SUM(CLOSING_COSTPRICE) FROM TWORK_INFO_IVST1 AA WHERE CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND SUBSTR(CLOSING_DATE,1,8) = (SELECT SUBSTR(MAX(B.CLOSING_DATE),1,8) FROM TWORK_INFO_IVST1 B WHERE B.CTKEY = A.CTKEY AND B.OWKEY = A.OWKEY AND B.ICKEY = A.ICKEY AND B.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND B.CLOSING_DATE < A.DT ) AND CTKEY = A.CTKEY AND OWKEY = A.OWKEY AND ICKEY = A.ICKEY AND LOGGRPCD = A.LOGGRPCD ),0) AS CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE ,COALESCE((SELECT SUM(CLOSING_SALEPRICE) FROM TWORK_INFO_IVST1 AA WHERE CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND SUBSTR(CLOSING_DATE,1,8) = (SELECT SUBSTR(MAX(B.CLOSING_DATE),1,8) FROM TWORK_INFO_IVST1 B WHERE B.CTKEY = A.CTKEY AND B.OWKEY = A.OWKEY AND B.ICKEY = A.ICKEY AND B.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND B.CLOSING_DATE < A.DT ) AND CTKEY = A.CTKEY AND OWKEY = A.OWKEY AND ICKEY = A.ICKEY AND LOGGRPCD = A.LOGGRPCD),0) AS CARRYOVER_SALEPRICE ,COALESCE(B.CLOSING_INVQTY, 0) ,COALESCE(B.CLOSING_COSTPRICE, 0) ,COALESCE(B.CLOSING_SALEPRICE, 0) ,A.ORHDTYPE ,COALESCE(B.TTQTY, 0) ,COALESCE(B.TTQTY_COSTPRICE, 0) ,COALESCE(B.TTQTY_SALEPRICE, 0) ,COALESCE(B.TTIBCANCELQTY, 0) ,COALESCE(B.TTADJQTY, 0) , #{sysdate} , #{surkey} , #{sysdate} , #{surkey} ,A.DCKEY ,COALESCE(B.CHITYMD, '0') ,A.DT AS SUBULYMD ,A.ICGRTYPE ,COALESCE(B.TRUNC_COSTPRICE, 0) ,COALESCE(B.DIFF_TTQTY, 0) ,COALESCE(B.DIFF_TTQTY_COSTPRICE, 0) FROM ( SELECT A.* FROM TMP_CAL A LEFT JOIN T_DAT B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.DT = B.SUBUL_YMD AND A.ICKEY = B.ICKEY ORDER BY A.DT) A LEFT JOIN T_DAT B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.DT = B.SUBUL_YMD AND A.ICKEY = B.ICKEY AND A.LOGGRPCD = B.LOGGRPCD ORDER BY CLOSING_DATE, ICKEY

INSERT INTO TWORK_INFO_IVST3 ( CLOSING_TYPE ,CLOSING_DATE ,CTKEY ,OWKEY ,ICKEY ,IVATKEY ,LOGGRPCD ,ICGRKEY ,STORE_KEY ,CARRYOVER_QTY ,CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE ,CARRYOVER_SALEPRICE ,CLOSING_INVQTY ,CLOSING_COSTPRICE ,CLOSING_SALEPRICE ,ORHDTYPE ,TTQTY ,TTQTY_COSTPRICE ,TTQTY_SALEPRICE ,TTIBCANCELQTY ,TTADJQTY ,INSERTDATE ,INSERTURKEY ,UPDATEDATE ,UPDATEURKEY ,DCKEY ,CHITYMD ,SUBULYMD ,ICGRTYPE ,TRUNC_COSTPRICE ,DIFF_TTQTY ,DIFF_TTQTY_COSTPRICE )
WITH T_CAL AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(dt_val, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DT FROM generate_series( TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{subulymd},1,6), 'YYYYMM'), TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{subulymd},1,6), 'YYYYMM') + (CAST(SUBSTR(#{subulymd},7,2) AS INTEGER) - 1), INTERVAL '1 day' ) AS dt_val ) , T_DAT AS ( SELECT SUBSTR(A.CLOSING_DATE,1,8) AS SUBUL_YMD, A.* FROM TWORK_INFO_IVST3 A WHERE CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND ORHDTYPE = 'UNK' AND CLOSING_DATE BETWEEN SUBSTR(#{subulymd},1,6) || '01' || '000000' AND #{subulymd} || '235959' AND CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} ) , TMP_CAL AS ( SELECT DISTINCT DT ,CTKEY ,OWKEY ,ICKEY ,IVATKEY ,LOGGRPCD ,ICGRKEY ,CARRYOVER_QTY ,CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE ,CARRYOVER_SALEPRICE ,CLOSING_INVQTY ,CLOSING_COSTPRICE ,CLOSING_SALEPRICE ,ORHDTYPE ,TTQTY ,TTQTY_COSTPRICE ,TTQTY_SALEPRICE ,TTIBCANCELQTY ,TTADJQTY ,INSERTDATE ,INSERTURKEY ,UPDATEDATE ,UPDATEURKEY ,CHITYMD ,DCKEY ,SUBULYMD ,ICGRTYPE ,TRUNC_COSTPRICE ,DIFF_TTQTY ,DIFF_TTQTY_COSTPRICE ,TAXYN ,CTGKEY FROM (SELECT DISTINCT CTKEY ,OWKEY ,ICKEY ,IVATKEY ,LOGGRPCD ,ICGRKEY ,CARRYOVER_QTY ,CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE ,CARRYOVER_SALEPRICE ,CLOSING_INVQTY ,CLOSING_COSTPRICE ,CLOSING_SALEPRICE ,ORHDTYPE ,TTQTY ,TTQTY_COSTPRICE ,TTQTY_SALEPRICE ,TTIBCANCELQTY ,TTADJQTY ,INSERTDATE ,INSERTURKEY ,UPDATEDATE ,UPDATEURKEY ,CHITYMD ,DCKEY ,SUBULYMD ,ICGRTYPE ,TRUNC_COSTPRICE ,DIFF_TTQTY ,DIFF_TTQTY_COSTPRICE ,TAXYN ,CTGKEY FROM T_DAT) B, (SELECT DT FROM T_CAL) A
)
SELECT DISTINCT 'IVS' AS CLOSING_TYPE ,CASE WHEN CLOSING_DATE IS NULL THEN A.DT||'000000' ELSE CLOSING_DATE END AS CLOSING_DATE ,A.CTKEY ,A.OWKEY ,A.ICKEY ,A.IVATKEY ,A.LOGGRPCD ,A.ICGRKEY ,'' ,COALESCE((SELECT SUM(CLOSING_INVQTY) FROM TWORK_INFO_IVST3 AA WHERE CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND SUBSTR(CLOSING_DATE,1,8) = (SELECT SUBSTR(MAX(B.CLOSING_DATE),1,8) FROM TWORK_INFO_IVST3 B WHERE B.CTKEY = A.CTKEY AND B.OWKEY = A.OWKEY AND B.ICKEY = A.ICKEY AND B.IVATKEY = A.IVATKEY AND B.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND B.CLOSING_DATE < A.DT ) AND CTKEY = A.CTKEY AND OWKEY = A.OWKEY AND ICKEY = A.ICKEY AND IVATKEY = A.IVATKEY AND LOGGRPCD = A.LOGGRPCD),0) AS CARRYOVER_QTY ,COALESCE((SELECT SUM(CLOSING_COSTPRICE) FROM TWORK_INFO_IVST3 AA WHERE CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND SUBSTR(CLOSING_DATE,1,8) = (SELECT SUBSTR(MAX(B.CLOSING_DATE),1,8) FROM TWORK_INFO_IVST3 B WHERE B.CTKEY = A.CTKEY AND B.OWKEY = A.OWKEY AND B.ICKEY = A.ICKEY AND B.IVATKEY = A.IVATKEY AND B.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND B.CLOSING_DATE < A.DT ) AND CTKEY = A.CTKEY AND OWKEY = A.OWKEY AND ICKEY = A.ICKEY AND IVATKEY = A.IVATKEY AND LOGGRPCD = A.LOGGRPCD ),0) AS CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE ,COALESCE((SELECT SUM(CLOSING_SALEPRICE) FROM TWORK_INFO_IVST3 AA WHERE CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND SUBSTR(CLOSING_DATE,1,8) = (SELECT SUBSTR(MAX(B.CLOSING_DATE),1,8) FROM TWORK_INFO_IVST3 B WHERE B.CTKEY = A.CTKEY AND B.OWKEY = A.OWKEY AND B.ICKEY = A.ICKEY AND B.IVATKEY = A.IVATKEY AND B.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND B.CLOSING_DATE < A.DT ) AND CTKEY = A.CTKEY AND OWKEY = A.OWKEY AND ICKEY = A.ICKEY AND IVATKEY = A.IVATKEY AND LOGGRPCD = A.LOGGRPCD),0) AS CARRYOVER_SALEPRICE ,COALESCE(B.CLOSING_INVQTY, 0) ,COALESCE(B.CLOSING_COSTPRICE, 0) ,COALESCE(B.CLOSING_SALEPRICE, 0) ,A.ORHDTYPE ,COALESCE(B.TTQTY, 0) ,COALESCE(B.TTQTY_COSTPRICE, 0) ,COALESCE(B.TTQTY_SALEPRICE, 0) ,COALESCE(B.TTIBCANCELQTY, 0) ,COALESCE(B.TTADJQTY, 0) , #{sysdate} , #{surkey} , #{sysdate} , #{surkey} ,A.DCKEY ,COALESCE(B.CHITYMD, '0') ,A.DT AS SUBULYMD ,A.ICGRTYPE ,COALESCE(B.TRUNC_COSTPRICE, 0) ,COALESCE(B.DIFF_TTQTY, 0) ,COALESCE(B.DIFF_TTQTY_COSTPRICE, 0) FROM ( SELECT A.* FROM TMP_CAL A LEFT JOIN T_DAT B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.DT = B.SUBUL_YMD AND A.ICKEY = B.ICKEY AND A.IVATKEY = B.IVATKEY ORDER BY A.DT) A LEFT JOIN T_DAT B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.DT = B.SUBUL_YMD AND A.ICKEY = B.ICKEY AND A.IVATKEY = B.IVATKEY AND A.LOGGRPCD = B.LOGGRPCD ORDER BY CLOSING_DATE, ICKEY

INSERT INTO TWORK_INFO_IVST_YYMM1 ( SUBUL_YYMM , CTKEY , ICGRKEY , ICGRNAME , OWKEY , ICKEY , ICNAME , CARRYOVER_QTY , CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE , ACIB_QTY , ACIB_COSTPRICE , ACOB_QTY , ACOB_COSTPRICE , OI_QTY , OI_COSTPRICE , IBTT_QTY , IBTT_COSTPRICE , STOB_QTY , STOB_COSTPRICE , STRI_QTY , STRI_COSTPRICE , STOBTT_QTY , STOBTT_SALEPRICE , STOBTT_COSTPRICE , STOBTT_PROFIT , DUOB_QTY , DUOB_COSTPRICE , DNOB_QTY , DNOB_COSTPRICE , DPOB_QTY , DPOB_COSTPRICE , OO_QTY , OO_COSTPRICE , SCO_QTY , SCO_COSTPRICE , IC_REPLACE_QTY , IC_REPLACE_COSTPRICE , NER_OBTT_QTY , NER_OBTT_SALEPRICE , NER_OBTT_COSTPRICE , NER_OBTT_PROFIT , OBTT_QTY , OBTT_SALEPRICE , OBTT_COSTPRICE , OBTT_PROFIT , DIFF_TTQTY , DIFF_TTQTY_COSTPRICE , PRO_CAL_COSTPRICE , IV_CON_QTY , IV_CON_SALEPRICE , IV_CON_COSTPRICE , IV_CON_PROFIT , CLOSING_INVQTY , CLOSING_COSTPRICE , ACKEY , ACNAME , REP_ACKEY , REP_ACNAME , SUBUL_NAME , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY , LOGGRPCD , AVGCOSTPRICE ) SELECT TO1.SUBUL_YYMM ,TO1.CTKEY ,TO1.ICGRKEY ,TO1.ICGRNAME ,TO1.OWKEY ,TO1.ICKEY ,TO1.ICNAME ,TO1.CARRYOVER_QTY ,TO1.CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE ,TO1.ACIB_QTY /* 거래처 입고 수량 */ ,TO1.ACIB_COSTPRICE /* 거래처 입고 금액 */ ,TO1.ACOB_QTY /* 거래처 반출 수량 */ ,TO1.ACOB_COSTPRICE /* 거래처 반출 금액 */ ,TO1.OI_QTY /* 기타 입고 수량 */ ,TO1.OI_COSTPRICE /* 기타 입고 금액 */ ,TO1.IBTT_QTY /* 입고 수량 합계 */ ,TO1.IBTT_COSTPRICE /* 입고 금액 합계 */ ,TO1.STOB_QTY /* 점포 출고 수량 */ ,TO1.STOB_COSTPRICE /* 점포 출고 금액 */ ,TO1.STRI_QTY /* 점포 반입 수량 */ ,TO1.STRI_COSTPRICE /* 점포 반입 금액 */ ,TO1.STOBTT_QTY /* 점포 출고계 수량 */ ,TO1.STOBTT_SALEPRICE /* 점포 출고계 매가 */ ,0 AS STOBTT_COSTPRICE ,0 AS STOBTT_PROFIT ,TO1.DUOB_QTY /* 폐기 수량 */ ,TO1.DUOB_COSTPRICE /* 폐기 금액 */ ,TO1.DNOB_QTY /* 기부 수량 */ ,TO1.DNOB_COSTPRICE /* 기부 금액 */ ,TO1.DPOB_QTY /* 매각 수량 */ ,TO1.DPOB_COSTPRICE /* 매각 금액 */ ,TO1.OO_QTY /* 기타 출고 수량 */ ,TO1.OO_COSTPRICE /* 기타 출고 금액 */ ,TO1.SCO_QTY /* 자가 소비 수량 */ ,TO1.SCO_COSTPRICE /* 자가 소비 금액 */ ,TO1.IC_REPLACE_QTY /* 상품 대체 수량 */ ,TO1.IC_REPLACE_COSTPRICE /*상품 대체 금액 */ ,0 AS NER_OBTT_QTY /* 사내 대체 수량 */ ,0 AS NER_OBTT_SALEPRICE /* 사내 대체 매가 */ ,0 AS NER_OBTT_COSTPRICE /* 사내 대체 원가 */ ,0 AS NER_OBTT_PROFIT /* 사내 대체 이익 */ ,TO1.OBTT_QTY /* 출고 수량 합계 */ ,TO1.OBTT_SALEPRICE /* 출고 매가 합계 */ ,0 AS OBTT_COSTPRICE ,0 AS AVGCOSTPRICE ,0 AS DIFF_TTQTY /* 상품 차이 수량 */ ,0 AS DIFF_TTQTY_COSTPRICE /* 상품 차이 금액 */ ,TO1.PRO_CAL_COSTPRICE /* 원가 정산 금액 */ ,TO1.IV_CON_QTY /* 재고 반영 수량 */ ,TO1.IV_CON_SALEPRICE /* 재고 반영 매가 */ ,TO1.IV_CON_COSTPRICE /* 재고 반영 원가 */ ,TO1.IV_CON_PROFIT /* 재고 반영 이익 */ ,TO1.CARRYOVER_QTY + TO1.IBTT_QTY - TO1.OBTT_QTY + TO1.IV_CON_QTY AS CLOSING_INVQTY ,TO1.CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE + TO1.IBTT_COSTPRICE - TRUNC(TO1.OBTT_QTY) + TO1.IV_CON_COSTPRICE AS CLOSING_COSTPRICE ,TO1.ACKEY ,TO1.ACNAME ,TO1.REP_ACKEY ,TO1.REP_ACNAME ,TO1.SUBUL_NAME , #{sysdate} , #{surkey} , #{sysdate} , #{surkey} ,TO1.LOGGRPCD ,0 AS AVGCOSTPRICE FROM ( SELECT TO1.SUBUL_YYMM ,TO1.CTKEY ,TO1.ICGRKEY ,TO1.ICGRNAME ,TO1.OWKEY ,TO1.ICKEY ,TO1.ICNAME ,COALESCE((SELECT SUM(CLOSING_INVQTY) FROM TWORK_INFO_IVST_YYMM1 A WHERE CTKEY = TO1.CTKEY AND OWKEY = TO1.OWKEY AND ICKEY = TO1.ICKEY AND SUBUL_YYMM = TO1.EX_MONTH), 0) AS CARRYOVER_QTY ,COALESCE((SELECT SUM(CLOSING_COSTPRICE) FROM TWORK_INFO_IVST_YYMM1 A WHERE CTKEY = TO1.CTKEY AND OWKEY = TO1.OWKEY AND ICKEY = TO1.ICKEY AND SUBUL_YYMM = TO1.EX_MONTH), 0) AS CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE ,SUM(TO1.ACIB_QTY) AS ACIB_QTY /* 거래처 입고 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.ACIB_COSTPRICE) AS ACIB_COSTPRICE /* 거래처 입고 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.ACOB_QTY) AS ACOB_QTY /* 거래처 반출 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.ACOB_COSTPRICE) AS ACOB_COSTPRICE /* 거래처 반출 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.OI_QTY) AS OI_QTY /* 기타 입고 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.OI_COSTPRICE) AS OI_COSTPRICE /* 기타 입고 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.IBTT_QTY) AS IBTT_QTY /* 입고 수량 합계 */ ,SUM(TO1.IBTT_COSTPRICE) AS IBTT_COSTPRICE /* 입고 금액 합계 */ ,SUM(TO1.STOB_QTY) AS STOB_QTY /* 점포 출고 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.STOB_COSTPRICE) AS STOB_COSTPRICE /* 점포 출고 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.STRI_QTY) AS STRI_QTY /* 점포 반입 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.STRI_COSTPRICE) AS STRI_COSTPRICE /* 점포 반입 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.STOBTT_QTY) AS STOBTT_QTY /* 점포 출고계 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.STOBTT_COSTPRICE) AS STOBTT_SALEPRICE /* 점포 출고계 매가 */ ,SUM(TO1.STOBTT_COSTPRICE) AS STOBTT_COSTPRICE /* 점포 출고계 원가 */ ,SUM(TO1.DUOB_QTY) AS DUOB_QTY /* 폐기 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.DUOB_COSTPRICE) AS DUOB_COSTPRICE /* 폐기 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.DNOB_QTY) AS DNOB_QTY /* 기부 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.DNOB_COSTPRICE) AS DNOB_COSTPRICE /* 기부 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.DPOB_QTY) AS DPOB_QTY /* 매각 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.DPOB_COSTPRICE) AS DPOB_COSTPRICE /* 매각 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.OO_QTY) AS OO_QTY /* 기타 출고 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.OO_COSTPRICE) AS OO_COSTPRICE /* 기타 출고 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.SCO_QTY) AS SCO_QTY /* 자가 소비 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.SCO_COSTPRICE) AS SCO_COSTPRICE /* 자가 소비 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.IC_REPLACE_QTY) AS IC_REPLACE_QTY /* 상품 대체 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.IC_REPLACE_COSTPRICE) AS IC_REPLACE_COSTPRICE /*상품 대체 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.OBTT_QTY) AS OBTT_QTY /* 출고 수량 합계 */ ,SUM(TO1.OBTT_SALEPRICE) AS OBTT_SALEPRICE /* 출고 매가 합계 */ ,SUM(TO1.OBTT_COSTPRICE) AS OBTT_COSTPRICE /* 출고 원가 합계 */ ,SUM(TO1.TRUNC_COSTPRICE) AS PRO_CAL_COSTPRICE /* 원가 정산 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.IV_CON_QTY) AS IV_CON_QTY /* 재고 반영 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.IV_CON_SALEPRICE) AS IV_CON_SALEPRICE /* 재고 반영 매가 */ ,SUM(TO1.IV_CON_COSTPRICE) AS IV_CON_COSTPRICE /* 재고 반영 원가 */ ,SUM(TO1.IV_CON_PROFIT) AS IV_CON_PROFIT /* 재고 반영 이익 */ ,SUM(TO1.CLOSING_INVQTY) AS CLOSING_INVQTY ,TRUNC(CASE WHEN MAX(TO1.CLOSING_COSTPRICE) > 0 THEN MAX(TO1.CLOSING_COSTPRICE) ELSE MIN(TO1.CLOSING_COSTPRICE) END) AS CLOSING_COSTPRICE ,TO1.ACKEY ,TO1.ACNAME ,TO1.REP_ACKEY ,TO1.REP_ACNAME ,TO1.SUBUL_NAME ,TO1.LOGGRPCD FROM ( SELECT TT1.SUBUL_YYMM ,TT1.ICGRKEY ,TT1.ICGRNAME ,TT1.CTKEY ,TT1.OWKEY ,TT1.ICKEY ,TT1.ICNAME ,TT1.LOGGRPCD ,(SELECT MAX(B.SUBUL_YYMM) FROM TWORK_INFO_IVST_YYMM1 B WHERE B.CTKEY = TT1.CTKEY AND B.OWKEY = TT1.OWKEY AND B.ICKEY = TT1.ICKEY AND B.SUBUL_YYMM < TT1.SUBUL_YYMM ) AS EX_MONTH ,TT1.CARRYOVER_QTY ,TT1.CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE ,TT1.ACIB_QTY ,TT1.ACIB_COSTPRICE ,TT1.ACOB_QTY ,TT1.ACOB_COSTPRICE ,TT1.OI_QTY ,TT1.OI_COSTPRICE ,(TT1.ACIB_QTY + TT1.OI_QTY) - TT1.ACOB_QTY AS IBTT_QTY ,TT1.ACIB_COSTPRICE + TT1.OI_COSTPRICE - TT1.ACOB_COSTPRICE AS IBTT_COSTPRICE ,TT1.STOB_QTY ,TT1.STOB_COSTPRICE ,TT1.STRI_QTY ,TT1.STRI_COSTPRICE ,TT1.STOB_QTY - TT1.STRI_QTY + TT1.DUOB_QTY + TT1.DNOB_QTY AS STOBTT_QTY ,TT1.STOB_COSTPRICE - TT1.STRI_COSTPRICE + TT1.DUOB_COSTPRICE + TT1.DNOB_COSTPRICE AS STOBTT_COSTPRICE ,TT1.STOB_SALEPRICE - TT1.STRI_SALEPRICE + TT1.DUOB_SALEPRICE + TT1.DNOB_SALEPRICE AS STOBTT_SALEPRICE ,(TT1.STOB_SALEPRICE - TT1.STRI_SALEPRICE + TT1.DUOB_COSTPRICE + TT1.DNOB_COSTPRICE) - (TT1.STOB_SALEPRICE - TT1.STRI_SALEPRICE + TT1.DUOB_SALEPRICE + TT1.DNOB_SALEPRICE) AS STOBTT_PROFIT ,TT1.DUOB_QTY ,TT1.DUOB_COSTPRICE ,TT1.DNOB_QTY ,TT1.DNOB_COSTPRICE ,TT1.DPOB_QTY ,TT1.DPOB_COSTPRICE ,TT1.OO_QTY ,TT1.OO_COSTPRICE ,TT1.SCO_QTY ,TT1.SCO_COSTPRICE ,TT1.IC_REPLACE_QTY ,TT1.IC_REPLACE_COSTPRICE ,(TT1.STOB_QTY - TT1.STRI_QTY + TT1.DUOB_QTY + TT1.DNOB_QTY) AS NER_OBTT_QTY ,(TT1.STOB_COSTPRICE - TT1.STRI_COSTPRICE + TT1.DUOB_COSTPRICE + TT1.DNOB_COSTPRICE) AS NER_OBTT_COSTPRICE ,(TT1.STOB_QTY - TT1.STRI_QTY + TT1.SCO_QTY + TT1.OO_QTY + TT1.DUOB_QTY + TT1.DNOB_QTY + TT1.DPOB_QTY + (TT1.IC_REPLACE_QTY * -1)) AS OBTT_QTY ,(TT1.STOB_COSTPRICE - TT1.STRI_COSTPRICE + TT1.SCO_COSTPRICE + TT1.OO_COSTPRICE + TT1.DUOB_COSTPRICE + TT1.DNOB_COSTPRICE + TT1.DPOB_COSTPRICE + (TT1.IC_REPLACE_COSTPRICE * -1)) AS OBTT_SALEPRICE ,(TT1.STOB_QTY - TT1.STRI_QTY + TT1.SCO_QTY + TT1.OO_QTY + TT1.DUOB_QTY + TT1.DNOB_QTY + TT1.DPOB_QTY + (TT1.IC_REPLACE_QTY * -1)) AS OBTT_COSTPRICE ,TT1.TRUNC_COSTPRICE /* 원가 정산 금액 */ ,TT1.IV_CON_QTY /* 재고 반영 수량 */ ,TT1.IV_CON_SALEPRICE /* 재고 반영 매가 */ ,TT1.IV_CON_COSTPRICE /* 재고 반영 금액 */ ,TT1.IV_CON_PROFIT /* 재고 반영 이익 */ ,TT1.ACKEY ,TT1.ACNAME ,TT1.REP_ACKEY ,TT1.REP_ACNAME ,TT1.SUBUL_NAME ,TT1.CLOSING_INVQTY ,TT1.CLOSING_COSTPRICE ,TT1.INSERTDATE ,TT1.INSERTURKEY ,TT1.UPDATEDATE ,TT1.UPDATEURKEY FROM ( SELECT SUBSTR(#{subulymd},1,6) AS SUBUL_YYMM ,A.ICGRKEY ,E.ICGRNAME ,A.CTKEY ,A.OWKEY ,B.ICKEY ,B.ICNAME ,A.LOGGRPCD ,A.STORE_KEY ,COALESCE(C.CARRYOVER_QTY, 0) AS CARRYOVER_QTY ,COALESCE(C.CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE, 0) AS CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '10' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '100' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '200') THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS ACIB_QTY /* 거래처 입고 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '10' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '100' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '200') THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS ACIB_COSTPRICE /* 거래처 입고 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '40' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '90' THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS ACOB_QTY /* 거래처 반출 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '40' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '90' THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS ACOB_COSTPRICE /* 거래처 반출 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '60' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '90' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '180' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '120') THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS OI_QTY /* 기타 입고 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '60' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '90' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '180' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '120') THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS OI_COSTPRICE /* 기타 입고 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '10' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '20' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '30' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '60' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '70' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '910' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '200' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '300' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '310' ) THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS STOB_QTY /* 점포 출고 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '10' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '20' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '30' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '60' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '70' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '910' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '200' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '300' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '310' ) THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS STOB_COSTPRICE /* 점포 출고 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '50' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '950' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '190') THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS STRI_QTY /* 점포 반입 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '50' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '950' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '190') THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS STRI_COSTPRICE /* 점포 반입 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '10' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '20' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '30' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '40' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '50' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '60' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '70' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '910' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '200') THEN A.TTQTY_SALEPRICE ELSE 0 END AS STOB_SALEPRICE /* 점포 출고 매가 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '50' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '950') THEN A.TTQTY_SALEPRICE ELSE 0 END AS STRI_SALEPRICE /* 점포 반입 매가 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '120' THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS DUOB_QTY /* 폐기 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '120' THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS DUOB_COSTPRICE /* 폐기 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '120' THEN A.TTQTY_SALEPRICE ELSE 0 END AS DUOB_SALEPRICE /* 폐기 매가 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '110' THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS DNOB_QTY /* 기부 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '110' THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS DNOB_COSTPRICE /* 기부 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '110' THEN A.TTQTY_SALEPRICE ELSE 0 END AS DNOB_SALEPRICE /* 기부 매가 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '130' THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS DPOB_QTY /* 매각 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '130' THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS DPOB_COSTPRICE /* 매각 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '50' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '80' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '100' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '140' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '180' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '50') THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS OO_QTY /* 기타 출고 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '50' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '80' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '100' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '140' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '180' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '50') THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS OO_COSTPRICE /* 기타 출고 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '190' THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS SCO_QTY /* 자가 소비 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '190' THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS SCO_COSTPRICE /* 자가 소비 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '018' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '019') THEN A.CLOSING_INVQTY ELSE 0 END AS IC_REPLACE_QTY /* 상품 대체 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '018' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '019') THEN A.CLOSING_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS IC_REPLACE_COSTPRICE /* 상품 대체 금액 */ ,A.TRUNC_COSTPRICE /* 원가 정산 금액 */ ,0 AS DIFF_TTQTY /* 상품 차이 수량 */ ,0 AS DIFF_TTQTY_COSTPRICE /* 상품 차이 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '70' THEN A.CLOSING_INVQTY ELSE 0 END AS IV_CON_QTY /* 재고 반영 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '70' THEN A.CLOSING_SALEPRICE ELSE 0 END AS IV_CON_SALEPRICE /* 재고 반영 매가 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '70' THEN A.CLOSING_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS IV_CON_COSTPRICE /* 재고 반영 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '70' THEN A.CLOSING_SALEPRICE - A.CLOSING_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS IV_CON_PROFIT /* 재고 반영 이익 */ ,B.ACKEY ,F.ACNAME ,(SELECT REP_ACKEY FROM TWORK_MST_AC WHERE CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND ACKEY = B.ACKEY AND OWKEY = B.OWKEY) AS REP_ACKEY ,(SELECT ACNAME FROM TWORK_MST_AC WHERE OWKEY = #{owkey} AND CTKEY = A.CTKEY AND ACKEY = (SELECT REP_ACKEY FROM TWORK_MST_AC WHERE CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND ACKEY = B.ACKEY AND OWKEY = B.OWKEY) ) AS REP_ACNAME ,(SELECT CTGNAME FROM TWORK_MST_CTG WHERE CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND CTGKEY = (SELECT UPPERCTGKEY FROM TWORK_MST_CTG WHERE CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND CTGKEY = (SELECT UPPERCTGKEY FROM TWORK_MST_CTG WHERE CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND CTGKEY = B.CTGKEY AND CTGLEVEL = '3') AND CTGLEVEL = '2' ) ) AS SUBUL_NAME ,(CASE WHEN D.CLOSING_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN A.CLOSING_INVQTY ELSE 0 END) AS CLOSING_INVQTY ,(CASE WHEN D.CLOSING_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN A.CLOSING_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END) AS CLOSING_COSTPRICE ,A.INSERTDATE ,A.INSERTURKEY ,A.UPDATEDATE ,A.UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_IVST1 A INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = B.ICKEY LEFT JOIN (SELECT CLOSING_TYPE ,CLOSING_DATE ,CTKEY ,OWKEY ,ICKEY ,ICGRKEY ,LOGGRPCD ,ORHDTYPE ,CLOSING_INVQTY AS CARRYOVER_QTY ,CLOSING_COSTPRICE AS CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE FROM TWORK_INFO_IVST1 WHERE CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND CLOSING_DATE = TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{subulymd},1,6) || '01','YYYYMMDD') - 1,'YYYYMMDD') || '000000' AND CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} AND ORHDTYPE = 'UNK' ) C ON A.CLOSING_TYPE = C.CLOSING_TYPE AND A.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = C.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = C.ICKEY AND A.ICGRKEY = C.ICGRKEY AND A.LOGGRPCD = C.LOGGRPCD AND A.ORHDTYPE = C.ORHDTYPE LEFT JOIN (SELECT CLOSING_TYPE , CLOSING_DATE ,CTKEY ,OWKEY ,ICKEY ,LOGGRPCD ,ORHDTYPE FROM TWORK_INFO_IVST1 WHERE CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND CLOSING_DATE BETWEEN SUBSTR(#{subulymd},1,6) || '01' || '000000' AND TO_CHAR(TO_DATE((DATE_TRUNC('month', #{subulymd}::DATE) + INTERVAL '1 month - 1 day')::DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ,'YYYYMMDD') || '235959' AND CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} AND ORHDTYPE = 'UNK' GROUP BY CLOSING_TYPE ,CTKEY ,OWKEY ,ICKEY ,LOGGRPCD ,ORHDTYPE ,CLOSING_DATE ) D ON A.CLOSING_TYPE = D.CLOSING_TYPE AND A.CLOSING_DATE = D.CLOSING_DATE AND A.CTKEY = D.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = D.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = D.ICKEY AND A.LOGGRPCD = D.LOGGRPCD AND A.ORHDTYPE = D.ORHDTYPE INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICGR E ON A.CTKEY = E.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = E.OWKEY AND A.ICGRKEY = E.ICGRKEY AND A.ICGRTYPE = E.ICGRTYPE INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_AC F ON B.CTKEY = F.CTKEY AND B.ACKEY = F.ACKEY AND B.OWKEY = F.OWKEY WHERE 1=1 AND A.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.CLOSING_DATE BETWEEN SUBSTR(#{subulymd},1,6) || '01'|| '000000' AND TO_CHAR(TO_DATE((DATE_TRUNC('month', #{subulymd}::DATE) + INTERVAL '1 month - 1 day')::DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ,'YYYYMMDD') || '235959' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT CNTR.ICKEY FROM TWORK_MST_CNTR CNTR WHERE A.CTKEY = CNTR.CTKEY AND A.ICKEY = CNTR.ICKEY AND A.OWKEY = CNTR.OWKEY ) ) TT1 ) TO1 GROUP BY TO1.SUBUL_YYMM ,TO1.ICGRKEY ,TO1.ICGRNAME ,TO1.CTKEY ,TO1.OWKEY ,TO1.ICKEY ,TO1.ICNAME ,TO1.LOGGRPCD ,TO1.ACKEY ,TO1.ACNAME ,TO1.REP_ACKEY ,TO1.REP_ACNAME ,TO1.SUBUL_NAME ,TO1.EX_MONTH ) TO1

/* wms-report-icReceiptSearch-sql-oracle.xml - insertIcReceiptCloseMonthIc3 */ INSERT INTO TWORK_INFO_IVST_YYMM5 ( SUBUL_YMD , CTKEY , ICGRKEY , ICGRNAME , OWKEY , ICKEY , ICNAME , CARRYOVER_QTY , CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE , ACIB_QTY , ACIB_COSTPRICE , ACOB_QTY , ACOB_COSTPRICE , OI_QTY , OI_COSTPRICE , IBTT_QTY , IBTT_COSTPRICE , STOB_QTY , STOB_COSTPRICE , STRI_QTY , STRI_COSTPRICE , STOBTT_QTY , STOBTT_SALEPRICE , STOBTT_COSTPRICE , STOBTT_PROFIT , DUOB_QTY , DUOB_COSTPRICE , DNOB_QTY , DNOB_COSTPRICE , DPOB_QTY , DPOB_COSTPRICE , OO_QTY , OO_COSTPRICE , SCO_QTY , SCO_COSTPRICE , IC_REPLACE_QTY , IC_REPLACE_COSTPRICE , NER_OBTT_QTY , NER_OBTT_SALEPRICE , NER_OBTT_COSTPRICE , NER_OBTT_PROFIT , OBTT_QTY , OBTT_SALEPRICE , OBTT_COSTPRICE , OBTT_PROFIT , DIFF_TTQTY , DIFF_TTQTY_COSTPRICE , PRO_CAL_COSTPRICE , IV_CON_QTY , IV_CON_SALEPRICE , IV_CON_COSTPRICE , IV_CON_PROFIT , CLOSING_INVQTY , CLOSING_COSTPRICE , ACKEY , ACNAME , REP_ACKEY , REP_ACNAME , SUBUL_NAME , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY , LOGGRPCD ) SELECT TO1.CLOSING_DATE ,TO1.CTKEY ,TO1.ICGRKEY ,TO1.ICGRNAME ,TO1.OWKEY ,TO1.ICKEY ,TO1.ICNAME ,TO1.CARRYOVER_QTY ,TO1.CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE ,TO1.ACIB_QTY /* 거래처 입고 수량 */ ,TO1.ACIB_COSTPRICE /* 거래처 입고 금액 */ ,TO1.ACOB_QTY /* 거래처 반출 수량 */ ,TO1.ACOB_COSTPRICE /* 거래처 반출 금액 */ ,TO1.OI_QTY /* 기타 입고 수량 */ ,TO1.OI_COSTPRICE /* 기타 입고 금액 */ ,TO1.IBTT_QTY /* 입고 수량 합계 */ ,TO1.IBTT_COSTPRICE /* 입고 금액 합계 */ ,TO1.STOB_QTY /* 점포 출고 수량 */ ,TO1.STOB_COSTPRICE /* 점포 출고 금액 */ ,TO1.STRI_QTY /* 점포 반입 수량 */ ,TO1.STRI_COSTPRICE /* 점포 반입 금액 */ ,TO1.STOBTT_QTY /* 점포 출고계 수량 */ ,TO1.STOBTT_SALEPRICE /* 점포 출고계 매가 */ ,0 AS STOBTT_COSTPRICE ,0 AS STOBTT_PROFIT ,TO1.DUOB_QTY /* 폐기 수량 */ ,TO1.DUOB_COSTPRICE /* 폐기 금액 */ ,TO1.DNOB_QTY /* 기부 수량 */ ,TO1.DNOB_COSTPRICE /* 기부 금액 */ ,TO1.DPOB_QTY /* 매각 수량 */ ,TO1.DPOB_COSTPRICE /* 매각 금액 */ ,TO1.OO_QTY /* 기타 출고 수량 */ ,TO1.OO_COSTPRICE /* 기타 출고 금액 */ ,TO1.SCO_QTY /* 자가 소비 수량 */ ,TO1.SCO_COSTPRICE /* 자가 소비 금액 */ ,TO1.IC_REPLACE_QTY /* 상품 대체 수량 */ ,TO1.IC_REPLACE_COSTPRICE /*상품 대체 금액 */ ,0 AS NER_OBTT_QTY /* 사내 대체 수량 */ ,0 AS NER_OBTT_SALEPRICE /* 사내 대체 매가 */ ,0 AS NER_OBTT_COSTPRICE /* 사내 대체 원가 */ ,0 AS NER_OBTT_PROFIT /* 사내 대체 이익 */ ,TO1.OBTT_QTY /* 출고 수량 합계 */ ,TO1.OBTT_SALEPRICE /* 출고 매가 합계 */ ,0 AS OBTT_COSTPRICE ,0 AS AVGCOSTPRICE ,0 AS DIFF_TTQTY /* 상품 차이 수량 */ ,0 AS DIFF_TTQTY_COSTPRICE /* 상품 차이 금액 */ ,TO1.PRO_CAL_COSTPRICE /* 원가 정산 금액 */ ,TO1.IV_CON_QTY /* 재고 반영 수량 */ ,TO1.IV_CON_SALEPRICE /* 재고 반영 매가 */ ,TO1.IV_CON_COSTPRICE /* 재고 반영 원가 */ ,TO1.IV_CON_PROFIT /* 재고 반영 이익 */ ,TO1.CLOSING_INVQTY ,TO1.CLOSING_COSTPRICE ,TO1.ACKEY ,TO1.ACNAME ,TO1.REP_ACKEY ,TO1.REP_ACNAME ,TO1.SUBUL_NAME , #{sysdate} , #{surkey} , #{sysdate} , #{surkey} ,TO1.LOGGRPCD FROM ( SELECT TO1.CLOSING_DATE ,TO1.CTKEY ,TO1.ICGRKEY ,TO1.ICGRNAME ,TO1.OWKEY ,TO1.ICKEY ,TO1.ICNAME ,SUM(TO1.CARRYOVER_QTY) AS CARRYOVER_QTY ,SUM(TO1.CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE) AS CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE ,SUM(TO1.ACIB_QTY) AS ACIB_QTY /* 거래처 입고 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.ACIB_COSTPRICE) AS ACIB_COSTPRICE /* 거래처 입고 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.ACOB_QTY) AS ACOB_QTY /* 거래처 반출 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.ACOB_COSTPRICE) AS ACOB_COSTPRICE /* 거래처 반출 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.OI_QTY) AS OI_QTY /* 기타 입고 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.OI_COSTPRICE) AS OI_COSTPRICE /* 기타 입고 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.IBTT_QTY) AS IBTT_QTY /* 입고 수량 합계 */ ,SUM(TO1.IBTT_COSTPRICE) AS IBTT_COSTPRICE /* 입고 금액 합계 */ ,SUM(TO1.STOB_QTY) AS STOB_QTY /* 점포 출고 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.STOB_COSTPRICE) AS STOB_COSTPRICE /* 점포 출고 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.STRI_QTY) AS STRI_QTY /* 점포 반입 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.STRI_COSTPRICE) AS STRI_COSTPRICE /* 점포 반입 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.STOBTT_QTY) AS STOBTT_QTY /* 점포 출고계 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.STOBTT_COSTPRICE) AS STOBTT_SALEPRICE /* 점포 출고계 매가 */ ,SUM(TO1.STOBTT_COSTPRICE) AS STOBTT_COSTPRICE /* 점포 출고계 원가 */ ,SUM(TO1.DUOB_QTY) AS DUOB_QTY /* 폐기 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.DUOB_COSTPRICE) AS DUOB_COSTPRICE /* 폐기 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.DNOB_QTY) AS DNOB_QTY /* 기부 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.DNOB_COSTPRICE) AS DNOB_COSTPRICE /* 기부 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.DPOB_QTY) AS DPOB_QTY /* 매각 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.DPOB_COSTPRICE) AS DPOB_COSTPRICE /* 매각 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.OO_QTY) AS OO_QTY /* 기타 출고 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.OO_COSTPRICE) AS OO_COSTPRICE /* 기타 출고 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.SCO_QTY) AS SCO_QTY /* 자가 소비 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.SCO_COSTPRICE) AS SCO_COSTPRICE /* 자가 소비 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.IC_REPLACE_QTY) AS IC_REPLACE_QTY /* 상품 대체 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.IC_REPLACE_COSTPRICE) AS IC_REPLACE_COSTPRICE /*상품 대체 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.OBTT_QTY) AS OBTT_QTY /* 출고 수량 합계 */ ,SUM(TO1.OBTT_SALEPRICE) AS OBTT_SALEPRICE /* 출고 매가 합계 */ ,SUM(TO1.OBTT_COSTPRICE) AS OBTT_COSTPRICE /* 출고 원가 합계 */ ,SUM(TO1.TRUNC_COSTPRICE) AS PRO_CAL_COSTPRICE /* 원가 정산 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.IV_CON_QTY) AS IV_CON_QTY /* 재고 반영 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.IV_CON_SALEPRICE) AS IV_CON_SALEPRICE /* 재고 반영 매가 */ ,SUM(TO1.IV_CON_COSTPRICE) AS IV_CON_COSTPRICE /* 재고 반영 원가 */ ,SUM(TO1.IV_CON_PROFIT) AS IV_CON_PROFIT /* 재고 반영 이익 */ ,TRUNC(CASE WHEN MAX(TO1.CLOSING_INVQTY) > 0 THEN MAX(TO1.CLOSING_INVQTY) ELSE MIN(TO1.CLOSING_INVQTY) END) AS CLOSING_INVQTY ,TRUNC(CASE WHEN MAX(TO1.CLOSING_COSTPRICE) > 0 THEN MAX(TO1.CLOSING_COSTPRICE) ELSE MIN(TO1.CLOSING_COSTPRICE) END) AS CLOSING_COSTPRICE ,TO1.ACKEY ,TO1.ACNAME ,TO1.REP_ACKEY ,TO1.REP_ACNAME ,TO1.SUBUL_NAME ,TO1.LOGGRPCD FROM ( SELECT TT1.CLOSING_DATE ,TT1.ICGRKEY ,TT1.ICGRNAME ,TT1.CTKEY ,TT1.OWKEY ,TT1.ICKEY ,TT1.ICNAME ,TT1.LOGGRPCD ,TT1.CARRYOVER_QTY ,TT1.CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE ,TT1.ACIB_QTY ,TT1.ACIB_COSTPRICE ,TT1.ACOB_QTY ,TT1.ACOB_COSTPRICE ,TT1.OI_QTY ,TT1.OI_COSTPRICE ,(TT1.ACIB_QTY + TT1.OI_QTY) - TT1.ACOB_QTY AS IBTT_QTY ,TT1.ACIB_COSTPRICE + TT1.OI_COSTPRICE - TT1.ACOB_COSTPRICE AS IBTT_COSTPRICE ,TT1.STOB_QTY ,TT1.STOB_COSTPRICE ,TT1.STRI_QTY ,TT1.STRI_COSTPRICE ,TT1.STOB_QTY - TT1.STRI_QTY + TT1.DUOB_QTY + TT1.DNOB_QTY AS STOBTT_QTY ,TT1.STOB_COSTPRICE - TT1.STRI_COSTPRICE + TT1.DUOB_COSTPRICE + TT1.DNOB_COSTPRICE AS STOBTT_COSTPRICE ,TT1.STOB_SALEPRICE - TT1.STRI_SALEPRICE + TT1.DUOB_SALEPRICE + TT1.DNOB_SALEPRICE AS STOBTT_SALEPRICE ,(TT1.STOB_SALEPRICE - TT1.STRI_SALEPRICE + TT1.DUOB_COSTPRICE + TT1.DNOB_COSTPRICE) - (TT1.STOB_SALEPRICE - TT1.STRI_SALEPRICE + TT1.DUOB_SALEPRICE + TT1.DNOB_SALEPRICE) AS STOBTT_PROFIT ,TT1.DUOB_QTY ,TT1.DUOB_COSTPRICE ,TT1.DNOB_QTY ,TT1.DNOB_COSTPRICE ,TT1.DPOB_QTY ,TT1.DPOB_COSTPRICE ,TT1.OO_QTY ,TT1.OO_COSTPRICE ,TT1.SCO_QTY ,TT1.SCO_COSTPRICE ,TT1.IC_REPLACE_QTY ,TT1.IC_REPLACE_COSTPRICE ,(TT1.STOB_QTY - TT1.STRI_QTY + TT1.DUOB_QTY + TT1.DNOB_QTY) AS NER_OBTT_QTY ,(TT1.STOB_COSTPRICE - TT1.STRI_COSTPRICE + TT1.DUOB_COSTPRICE + TT1.DNOB_COSTPRICE) AS NER_OBTT_COSTPRICE ,(TT1.STOB_QTY - TT1.STRI_QTY + TT1.SCO_QTY + TT1.OO_QTY + TT1.DUOB_QTY + TT1.DNOB_QTY + TT1.DPOB_QTY + (TT1.IC_REPLACE_QTY * -1)) AS OBTT_QTY ,(TT1.STOB_COSTPRICE - TT1.STRI_COSTPRICE + TT1.SCO_COSTPRICE + TT1.OO_COSTPRICE + TT1.DUOB_COSTPRICE + TT1.DNOB_COSTPRICE + TT1.DPOB_COSTPRICE + (TT1.IC_REPLACE_COSTPRICE * -1)) AS OBTT_SALEPRICE ,(TT1.STOB_QTY - TT1.STRI_QTY + TT1.SCO_QTY + TT1.OO_QTY + TT1.DUOB_QTY + TT1.DNOB_QTY + TT1.DPOB_QTY + (TT1.IC_REPLACE_QTY * -1)) AS OBTT_COSTPRICE ,TT1.TRUNC_COSTPRICE /* 원가 정산 금액 */ ,TT1.IV_CON_QTY /* 재고 반영 수량 */ ,TT1.IV_CON_SALEPRICE /* 재고 반영 매가 */ ,TT1.IV_CON_COSTPRICE /* 재고 반영 금액 */ ,TT1.IV_CON_PROFIT /* 재고 반영 이익 */ ,TT1.ACKEY ,TT1.ACNAME ,TT1.REP_ACKEY ,TT1.REP_ACNAME ,TT1.SUBUL_NAME ,TT1.CLOSING_INVQTY ,TT1.CLOSING_COSTPRICE FROM ( SELECT SUBSTR(A.CLOSING_DATE,1,8) AS CLOSING_DATE ,A.ICGRKEY ,E.ICGRNAME ,A.CTKEY ,A.OWKEY ,B.ICKEY ,B.ICNAME ,A.LOGGRPCD ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IVS' THEN A.CARRYOVER_QTY ELSE 0 END AS CARRYOVER_QTY /* 기초 재고 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IVS' THEN A.CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE /* 기초 재고 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '10' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '100' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '200') THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS ACIB_QTY /* 거래처 입고 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '10' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '100' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '200') THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS ACIB_COSTPRICE /* 거래처 입고 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '40' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '90' THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS ACOB_QTY /* 거래처 반출 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '40' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '90' THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS ACOB_COSTPRICE /* 거래처 반출 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '60' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '90' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '180' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '120') THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS OI_QTY /* 기타 입고 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '60' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '90' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '180' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '120') THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS OI_COSTPRICE /* 기타 입고 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '10' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '20' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '30' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '60' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '70' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '910' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '200' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '300' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '310' ) THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS STOB_QTY /* 점포 출고 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '10' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '20' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '30' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '60' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '70' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '910' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '200' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '300' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '310' ) THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS STOB_COSTPRICE /* 점포 출고 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '50' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '950' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '190') THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS STRI_QTY /* 점포 반입 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '50' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '950' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '190') THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS STRI_COSTPRICE /* 점포 반입 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '10' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '20' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '30' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '40' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '50' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '60' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '70' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '910' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '200') THEN A.TTQTY_SALEPRICE ELSE 0 END AS STOB_SALEPRICE /* 점포 출고 매가 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '50' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '950') THEN A.TTQTY_SALEPRICE ELSE 0 END AS STRI_SALEPRICE /* 점포 반입 매가 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '120' THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS DUOB_QTY /* 폐기 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '120' THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS DUOB_COSTPRICE /* 폐기 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '120' THEN A.TTQTY_SALEPRICE ELSE 0 END AS DUOB_SALEPRICE /* 폐기 매가 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '110' THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS DNOB_QTY /* 기부 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '110' THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS DNOB_COSTPRICE /* 기부 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '110' THEN A.TTQTY_SALEPRICE ELSE 0 END AS DNOB_SALEPRICE /* 기부 매가 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '130' THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS DPOB_QTY /* 매각 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '130' THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS DPOB_COSTPRICE /* 매각 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '50' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '80' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '100' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '140' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '180' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '50') THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS OO_QTY /* 기타 출고 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '50' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '80' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '100' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '140' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '180' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '50') THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS OO_COSTPRICE /* 기타 출고 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '190' THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS SCO_QTY /* 자가 소비 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '190' THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS SCO_COSTPRICE /* 자가 소비 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IVS' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '018' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '019') THEN A.CLOSING_INVQTY ELSE 0 END AS IC_REPLACE_QTY /* 상품 대체 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IVS' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '018' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '019') THEN A.CLOSING_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS IC_REPLACE_COSTPRICE /* 상품 대체 금액 */ ,A.TRUNC_COSTPRICE /* 원가 정산 금액 */ ,0 AS DIFF_TTQTY /* 상품 차이 수량 */ ,0 AS DIFF_TTQTY_COSTPRICE /* 상품 차이 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IVS' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '70' THEN A.CLOSING_INVQTY ELSE 0 END AS IV_CON_QTY /* 재고 반영 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IVS' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '70' THEN A.CLOSING_SALEPRICE ELSE 0 END AS IV_CON_SALEPRICE /* 재고 반영 매가 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IVS' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '70' THEN A.CLOSING_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS IV_CON_COSTPRICE /* 재고 반영 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IVS' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '70' THEN A.CLOSING_SALEPRICE - A.CLOSING_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS IV_CON_PROFIT /* 재고 반영 이익 */ ,B.ACKEY ,F.ACNAME ,(SELECT REP_ACKEY FROM TWORK_MST_AC WHERE CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND ACKEY = B.ACKEY AND OWKEY = B.OWKEY) AS REP_ACKEY ,(SELECT ACNAME FROM TWORK_MST_AC WHERE OWKEY =#{owkey} AND CTKEY = A.CTKEY AND ACKEY = (SELECT REP_ACKEY FROM TWORK_MST_AC WHERE CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND ACKEY = B.ACKEY AND OWKEY = B.OWKEY) ) AS REP_ACNAME ,(SELECT CTGNAME FROM TWORK_MST_CTG WHERE CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND CTGKEY = (SELECT UPPERCTGKEY FROM TWORK_MST_CTG WHERE CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND CTGKEY = (SELECT UPPERCTGKEY FROM TWORK_MST_CTG WHERE CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND CTGKEY = B.CTGKEY AND CTGLEVEL = '3') AND CTGLEVEL = '2' ) ) AS SUBUL_NAME ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IVS' THEN A.CLOSING_INVQTY ELSE 0 END AS CLOSING_INVQTY ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IVS' THEN A.CLOSING_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS CLOSING_COSTPRICE FROM TWORK_INFO_IVST1 A ,TWORK_MST_IC B ,TWORK_MST_ICGR E ,TWORK_MST_AC F WHERE 1=1 AND A.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.CLOSING_DATE BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{subulymd},1,6) || '01','YYYYMMDD') - 1,'YYYYMMDD') || '150000' AND TO_CHAR(TO_DATE((DATE_TRUNC('month', #{subulymd}::DATE) + INTERVAL '1 month - 1 day')::DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') - 1,'YYYYMMDD') || '150000' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT CNTR.ICKEY FROM TWORK_MST_CNTR CNTR WHERE A.CTKEY = CNTR.CTKEY AND A.ICKEY = CNTR.ICKEY AND A.OWKEY = CNTR.OWKEY ) AND A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = B.ICKEY AND A.CTKEY = E.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = E.OWKEY AND A.ICGRKEY = E.ICGRKEY AND A.ICGRTYPE = E.ICGRTYPE AND B.CTKEY = F.CTKEY AND B.ACKEY = F.ACKEY AND B.OWKEY = F.OWKEY ) TT1 ) TO1 GROUP BY TO1.CLOSING_DATE ,TO1.ICGRKEY ,TO1.ICGRNAME ,TO1.CTKEY ,TO1.OWKEY ,TO1.ICKEY ,TO1.ICNAME ,TO1.LOGGRPCD ,TO1.ACKEY ,TO1.ACNAME ,TO1.REP_ACKEY ,TO1.REP_ACNAME ,TO1.SUBUL_NAME ) TO1

INSERT INTO TWORK_INFO_IVST_YYMM6 ( SUBUL_YMD , CTKEY , ICGRKEY , ICGRNAME , OWKEY , ICKEY , IVATKEY , ICNAME , CARRYOVER_QTY , CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE , ACIB_QTY , ACIB_COSTPRICE , ACOB_QTY , ACOB_COSTPRICE , OI_QTY , OI_COSTPRICE , IBTT_QTY , IBTT_COSTPRICE , STOB_QTY , STOB_COSTPRICE , STRI_QTY , STRI_COSTPRICE , STOBTT_QTY , STOBTT_SALEPRICE , STOBTT_COSTPRICE , STOBTT_PROFIT , DUOB_QTY , DUOB_COSTPRICE , DNOB_QTY , DNOB_COSTPRICE , DPOB_QTY , DPOB_COSTPRICE , OO_QTY , OO_COSTPRICE , SCO_QTY , SCO_COSTPRICE , IC_REPLACE_QTY , IC_REPLACE_COSTPRICE , NER_OBTT_QTY , NER_OBTT_SALEPRICE , NER_OBTT_COSTPRICE , NER_OBTT_PROFIT , OBTT_QTY , OBTT_SALEPRICE , OBTT_COSTPRICE , OBTT_PROFIT , DIFF_TTQTY , DIFF_TTQTY_COSTPRICE , PRO_CAL_COSTPRICE , IV_CON_QTY , IV_CON_SALEPRICE , IV_CON_COSTPRICE , IV_CON_PROFIT , CLOSING_INVQTY , CLOSING_COSTPRICE , ACKEY , ACNAME , REP_ACKEY , REP_ACNAME , SUBUL_NAME , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY , LOGGRPCD ) SELECT SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO1.CLOSING_DATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') + (9 / (24 * 60) * 60),'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),1,8) ,TO1.CTKEY ,TO1.ICGRKEY ,TO1.ICGRNAME ,TO1.OWKEY ,TO1.ICKEY ,TO1.IVATKEY ,TO1.ICNAME ,TO1.CARRYOVER_QTY ,TO1.CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE ,TO1.ACIB_QTY /* 거래처 입고 수량 */ ,TO1.ACIB_COSTPRICE /* 거래처 입고 금액 */ ,TO1.ACOB_QTY /* 거래처 반출 수량 */ ,TO1.ACOB_COSTPRICE /* 거래처 반출 금액 */ ,TO1.OI_QTY /* 기타 입고 수량 */ ,TO1.OI_COSTPRICE /* 기타 입고 금액 */ ,TO1.IBTT_QTY /* 입고 수량 합계 */ ,TO1.IBTT_COSTPRICE /* 입고 금액 합계 */ ,TO1.STOB_QTY /* 점포 출고 수량 */ ,TO1.STOB_COSTPRICE /* 점포 출고 금액 */ ,TO1.STRI_QTY /* 점포 반입 수량 */ ,TO1.STRI_COSTPRICE /* 점포 반입 금액 */ ,TO1.STOBTT_QTY /* 점포 출고계 수량 */ ,TO1.STOBTT_SALEPRICE /* 점포 출고계 매가 */ ,0 AS STOBTT_COSTPRICE ,0 AS STOBTT_PROFIT ,TO1.DUOB_QTY /* 폐기 수량 */ ,TO1.DUOB_COSTPRICE /* 폐기 금액 */ ,TO1.DNOB_QTY /* 기부 수량 */ ,TO1.DNOB_COSTPRICE /* 기부 금액 */ ,TO1.DPOB_QTY /* 매각 수량 */ ,TO1.DPOB_COSTPRICE /* 매각 금액 */ ,TO1.OO_QTY /* 기타 출고 수량 */ ,TO1.OO_COSTPRICE /* 기타 출고 금액 */ ,TO1.SCO_QTY /* 자가 소비 수량 */ ,TO1.SCO_COSTPRICE /* 자가 소비 금액 */ ,TO1.IC_REPLACE_QTY /* 상품 대체 수량 */ ,TO1.IC_REPLACE_COSTPRICE /*상품 대체 금액 */ ,0 AS NER_OBTT_QTY /* 사내 대체 수량 */ ,0 AS NER_OBTT_SALEPRICE /* 사내 대체 매가 */ ,0 AS NER_OBTT_COSTPRICE /* 사내 대체 원가 */ ,0 AS NER_OBTT_PROFIT /* 사내 대체 이익 */ ,TO1.OBTT_QTY /* 출고 수량 합계 */ ,TO1.OBTT_SALEPRICE /* 출고 매가 합계 */ ,0 AS OBTT_COSTPRICE ,0 AS AVGCOSTPRICE ,0 AS DIFF_TTQTY /* 상품 차이 수량 */ ,0 AS DIFF_TTQTY_COSTPRICE /* 상품 차이 금액 */ ,TO1.PRO_CAL_COSTPRICE /* 원가 정산 금액 */ ,TO1.IV_CON_QTY /* 재고 반영 수량 */ ,TO1.IV_CON_SALEPRICE /* 재고 반영 매가 */ ,TO1.IV_CON_COSTPRICE /* 재고 반영 원가 */ ,TO1.IV_CON_PROFIT /* 재고 반영 이익 */ ,TO1.CLOSING_INVQTY ,TO1.CLOSING_COSTPRICE ,TO1.ACKEY ,TO1.ACNAME ,TO1.REP_ACKEY ,TO1.REP_ACNAME ,TO1.SUBUL_NAME , #{sysdate} , #{surkey} , #{sysdate} , #{surkey} ,TO1.LOGGRPCD FROM ( SELECT TO1.CLOSING_DATE ,TO1.CTKEY ,TO1.ICGRKEY ,TO1.ICGRNAME ,TO1.OWKEY ,TO1.ICKEY ,TO1.IVATKEY ,TO1.ICNAME ,SUM(TO1.CARRYOVER_QTY) AS CARRYOVER_QTY ,SUM(TO1.CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE) AS CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE ,SUM(TO1.ACIB_QTY) AS ACIB_QTY /* 거래처 입고 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.ACIB_COSTPRICE) AS ACIB_COSTPRICE /* 거래처 입고 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.ACOB_QTY) AS ACOB_QTY /* 거래처 반출 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.ACOB_COSTPRICE) AS ACOB_COSTPRICE /* 거래처 반출 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.OI_QTY) AS OI_QTY /* 기타 입고 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.OI_COSTPRICE) AS OI_COSTPRICE /* 기타 입고 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.IBTT_QTY) AS IBTT_QTY /* 입고 수량 합계 */ ,SUM(TO1.IBTT_COSTPRICE) AS IBTT_COSTPRICE /* 입고 금액 합계 */ ,SUM(TO1.STOB_QTY) AS STOB_QTY /* 점포 출고 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.STOB_COSTPRICE) AS STOB_COSTPRICE /* 점포 출고 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.STRI_QTY) AS STRI_QTY /* 점포 반입 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.STRI_COSTPRICE) AS STRI_COSTPRICE /* 점포 반입 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.STOBTT_QTY) AS STOBTT_QTY /* 점포 출고계 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.STOBTT_COSTPRICE) AS STOBTT_SALEPRICE /* 점포 출고계 매가 */ ,SUM(TO1.STOBTT_COSTPRICE) AS STOBTT_COSTPRICE /* 점포 출고계 원가 */ ,SUM(TO1.DUOB_QTY) AS DUOB_QTY /* 폐기 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.DUOB_COSTPRICE) AS DUOB_COSTPRICE /* 폐기 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.DNOB_QTY) AS DNOB_QTY /* 기부 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.DNOB_COSTPRICE) AS DNOB_COSTPRICE /* 기부 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.DPOB_QTY) AS DPOB_QTY /* 매각 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.DPOB_COSTPRICE) AS DPOB_COSTPRICE /* 매각 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.OO_QTY) AS OO_QTY /* 기타 출고 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.OO_COSTPRICE) AS OO_COSTPRICE /* 기타 출고 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.SCO_QTY) AS SCO_QTY /* 자가 소비 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.SCO_COSTPRICE) AS SCO_COSTPRICE /* 자가 소비 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.IC_REPLACE_QTY) AS IC_REPLACE_QTY /* 상품 대체 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.IC_REPLACE_COSTPRICE) AS IC_REPLACE_COSTPRICE /*상품 대체 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.OBTT_QTY) AS OBTT_QTY /* 출고 수량 합계 */ ,SUM(TO1.OBTT_SALEPRICE) AS OBTT_SALEPRICE /* 출고 매가 합계 */ ,SUM(TO1.OBTT_COSTPRICE) AS OBTT_COSTPRICE /* 출고 원가 합계 */ ,SUM(TO1.TRUNC_COSTPRICE) AS PRO_CAL_COSTPRICE /* 원가 정산 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.IV_CON_QTY) AS IV_CON_QTY /* 재고 반영 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.IV_CON_SALEPRICE) AS IV_CON_SALEPRICE /* 재고 반영 매가 */ ,SUM(TO1.IV_CON_COSTPRICE) AS IV_CON_COSTPRICE /* 재고 반영 원가 */ ,SUM(TO1.IV_CON_PROFIT) AS IV_CON_PROFIT /* 재고 반영 이익 */ ,TRUNC(CASE WHEN MAX(TO1.CLOSING_INVQTY) > 0 THEN MAX(TO1.CLOSING_INVQTY) ELSE MIN(TO1.CLOSING_INVQTY) END) AS CLOSING_INVQTY ,TRUNC(CASE WHEN MAX(TO1.CLOSING_COSTPRICE) > 0 THEN MAX(TO1.CLOSING_COSTPRICE) ELSE MIN(TO1.CLOSING_COSTPRICE) END) AS CLOSING_COSTPRICE ,TO1.ACKEY ,TO1.ACNAME ,TO1.REP_ACKEY ,TO1.REP_ACNAME ,TO1.SUBUL_NAME ,TO1.LOGGRPCD FROM ( SELECT TT1.CLOSING_DATE ,TT1.ICGRKEY ,TT1.ICGRNAME ,TT1.CTKEY ,TT1.OWKEY ,TT1.ICKEY ,TT1.IVATKEY ,TT1.ICNAME ,TT1.LOGGRPCD ,TT1.CARRYOVER_QTY ,TT1.CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE ,TT1.ACIB_QTY ,TT1.ACIB_COSTPRICE ,TT1.ACOB_QTY ,TT1.ACOB_COSTPRICE ,TT1.OI_QTY ,TT1.OI_COSTPRICE ,(TT1.ACIB_QTY + TT1.OI_QTY) - TT1.ACOB_QTY AS IBTT_QTY ,TT1.ACIB_COSTPRICE + TT1.OI_COSTPRICE - TT1.ACOB_COSTPRICE AS IBTT_COSTPRICE ,TT1.STOB_QTY ,TT1.STOB_COSTPRICE ,TT1.STRI_QTY ,TT1.STRI_COSTPRICE ,TT1.STOB_QTY - TT1.STRI_QTY + TT1.DUOB_QTY + TT1.DNOB_QTY AS STOBTT_QTY ,TT1.STOB_COSTPRICE - TT1.STRI_COSTPRICE + TT1.DUOB_COSTPRICE + TT1.DNOB_COSTPRICE AS STOBTT_COSTPRICE ,TT1.STOB_SALEPRICE - TT1.STRI_SALEPRICE + TT1.DUOB_SALEPRICE + TT1.DNOB_SALEPRICE AS STOBTT_SALEPRICE ,(TT1.STOB_SALEPRICE - TT1.STRI_SALEPRICE + TT1.DUOB_COSTPRICE + TT1.DNOB_COSTPRICE) - (TT1.STOB_SALEPRICE - TT1.STRI_SALEPRICE + TT1.DUOB_SALEPRICE + TT1.DNOB_SALEPRICE) AS STOBTT_PROFIT ,TT1.DUOB_QTY ,TT1.DUOB_COSTPRICE ,TT1.DNOB_QTY ,TT1.DNOB_COSTPRICE ,TT1.DPOB_QTY ,TT1.DPOB_COSTPRICE ,TT1.OO_QTY ,TT1.OO_COSTPRICE ,TT1.SCO_QTY ,TT1.SCO_COSTPRICE ,TT1.IC_REPLACE_QTY ,TT1.IC_REPLACE_COSTPRICE ,(TT1.STOB_QTY - TT1.STRI_QTY + TT1.DUOB_QTY + TT1.DNOB_QTY) AS NER_OBTT_QTY ,(TT1.STOB_COSTPRICE - TT1.STRI_COSTPRICE + TT1.DUOB_COSTPRICE + TT1.DNOB_COSTPRICE) AS NER_OBTT_COSTPRICE ,(TT1.STOB_QTY - TT1.STRI_QTY + TT1.SCO_QTY + TT1.OO_QTY + TT1.DUOB_QTY + TT1.DNOB_QTY + TT1.DPOB_QTY + (TT1.IC_REPLACE_QTY * -1)) AS OBTT_QTY ,(TT1.STOB_COSTPRICE - TT1.STRI_COSTPRICE + TT1.SCO_COSTPRICE + TT1.OO_COSTPRICE + TT1.DUOB_COSTPRICE + TT1.DNOB_COSTPRICE + TT1.DPOB_COSTPRICE + (TT1.IC_REPLACE_COSTPRICE * -1)) AS OBTT_SALEPRICE ,(TT1.STOB_QTY - TT1.STRI_QTY + TT1.SCO_QTY + TT1.OO_QTY + TT1.DUOB_QTY + TT1.DNOB_QTY + TT1.DPOB_QTY + (TT1.IC_REPLACE_QTY * -1)) AS OBTT_COSTPRICE ,TT1.TRUNC_COSTPRICE /* 원가 정산 금액 */ ,TT1.IV_CON_QTY /* 재고 반영 수량 */ ,TT1.IV_CON_SALEPRICE /* 재고 반영 매가 */ ,TT1.IV_CON_COSTPRICE /* 재고 반영 금액 */ ,TT1.IV_CON_PROFIT /* 재고 반영 이익 */ ,TT1.ACKEY ,TT1.ACNAME ,TT1.REP_ACKEY ,TT1.REP_ACNAME ,TT1.SUBUL_NAME ,TT1.CLOSING_INVQTY ,TT1.CLOSING_COSTPRICE FROM ( SELECT A.CLOSING_DATE ,A.ICGRKEY ,E.ICGRNAME ,A.CTKEY ,A.OWKEY ,B.ICKEY ,A.IVATKEY ,B.ICNAME ,A.LOGGRPCD ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IVS' THEN A.CARRYOVER_QTY ELSE 0 END AS CARRYOVER_QTY /* 기초 재고 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IVS' THEN A.CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE /* 기초 재고 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '10' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '100' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '200') THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS ACIB_QTY /* 거래처 입고 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '10' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '100' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '200') THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS ACIB_COSTPRICE /* 거래처 입고 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '40' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '90' THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS ACOB_QTY /* 거래처 반출 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '40' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '90' THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS ACOB_COSTPRICE /* 거래처 반출 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '60' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '90' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '180' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '120') THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS OI_QTY /* 기타 입고 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '60' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '90' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '180' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '120') THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS OI_COSTPRICE /* 기타 입고 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '10' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '20' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '30' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '60' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '70' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '910' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '200' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '300' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '310' ) THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS STOB_QTY /* 점포 출고 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '10' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '20' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '30' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '60' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '70' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '910' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '200' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '300' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '310' ) THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS STOB_COSTPRICE /* 점포 출고 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '50' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '950' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '190') THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS STRI_QTY /* 점포 반입 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '50' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '950' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '190') THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS STRI_COSTPRICE /* 점포 반입 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '10' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '20' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '30' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '40' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '50' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '60' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '70' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '910' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '200') THEN A.TTQTY_SALEPRICE ELSE 0 END AS STOB_SALEPRICE /* 점포 출고 매가 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '50' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '950') THEN A.TTQTY_SALEPRICE ELSE 0 END AS STRI_SALEPRICE /* 점포 반입 매가 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '120' THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS DUOB_QTY /* 폐기 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '120' THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS DUOB_COSTPRICE /* 폐기 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '120' THEN A.TTQTY_SALEPRICE ELSE 0 END AS DUOB_SALEPRICE /* 폐기 매가 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '110' THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS DNOB_QTY /* 기부 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '110' THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS DNOB_COSTPRICE /* 기부 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '110' THEN A.TTQTY_SALEPRICE ELSE 0 END AS DNOB_SALEPRICE /* 기부 매가 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '130' THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS DPOB_QTY /* 매각 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '130' THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS DPOB_COSTPRICE /* 매각 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '50' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '80' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '100' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '140' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '180' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '50') THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS OO_QTY /* 기타 출고 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '50' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '80' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '100' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '140' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '180' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '50') THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS OO_COSTPRICE /* 기타 출고 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '190' THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS SCO_QTY /* 자가 소비 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '190' THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS SCO_COSTPRICE /* 자가 소비 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '018' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '019') THEN A.CLOSING_INVQTY ELSE 0 END AS IC_REPLACE_QTY /* 상품 대체 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '018' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '019') THEN A.CLOSING_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS IC_REPLACE_COSTPRICE /* 상품 대체 금액 */ ,A.TRUNC_COSTPRICE /* 원가 정산 금액 */ ,0 AS DIFF_TTQTY /* 상품 차이 수량 */ ,0 AS DIFF_TTQTY_COSTPRICE /* 상품 차이 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '70' THEN A.CLOSING_INVQTY ELSE 0 END AS IV_CON_QTY /* 재고 반영 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '70' THEN A.CLOSING_SALEPRICE ELSE 0 END AS IV_CON_SALEPRICE /* 재고 반영 매가 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '70' THEN A.CLOSING_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS IV_CON_COSTPRICE /* 재고 반영 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '70' THEN A.CLOSING_SALEPRICE - A.CLOSING_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS IV_CON_PROFIT /* 재고 반영 이익 */ ,B.ACKEY ,F.ACNAME ,(SELECT REP_ACKEY FROM TWORK_MST_AC WHERE CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND ACKEY = B.ACKEY AND OWKEY = B.OWKEY) AS REP_ACKEY ,(SELECT ACNAME FROM TWORK_MST_AC WHERE OWKEY =#{owkey} AND CTKEY = A.CTKEY AND ACKEY = (SELECT REP_ACKEY FROM TWORK_MST_AC WHERE CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND ACKEY = B.ACKEY AND OWKEY = B.OWKEY) ) AS REP_ACNAME ,(SELECT CTGNAME FROM TWORK_MST_CTG WHERE CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND CTGKEY = (SELECT UPPERCTGKEY FROM TWORK_MST_CTG WHERE CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND CTGKEY = (SELECT UPPERCTGKEY FROM TWORK_MST_CTG WHERE CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND CTGKEY = B.CTGKEY AND CTGLEVEL = '3') AND CTGLEVEL = '2' ) ) AS SUBUL_NAME ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IVS' THEN A.CLOSING_INVQTY ELSE 0 END AS CLOSING_INVQTY ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IVS' THEN A.CLOSING_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS CLOSING_COSTPRICE FROM TWORK_INFO_IVST3 A ,TWORK_MST_IC B ,TWORK_MST_ICGR E ,TWORK_MST_AC F WHERE 1=1 AND A.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.CLOSING_DATE BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{subulymd},1,6) || '01','YYYYMMDD') - 1,'YYYYMMDD') || '150000' AND TO_CHAR(TO_DATE((DATE_TRUNC('month', #{subulymd}::DATE) + INTERVAL '1 month - 1 day')::DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') - 1,'YYYYMMDD') || '150000' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT CNTR.ICKEY FROM TWORK_MST_CNTR CNTR WHERE A.CTKEY = CNTR.CTKEY AND A.ICKEY = CNTR.ICKEY AND A.OWKEY = CNTR.OWKEY ) AND A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = B.ICKEY AND A.CTKEY = E.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = E.OWKEY AND A.ICGRKEY = E.ICGRKEY AND A.ICGRTYPE = E.ICGRTYPE AND B.CTKEY = F.CTKEY AND B.ACKEY = F.ACKEY AND B.OWKEY = F.OWKEY ) TT1 ) TO1 GROUP BY TO1.CLOSING_DATE ,TO1.ICGRKEY ,TO1.ICGRNAME ,TO1.CTKEY ,TO1.OWKEY ,TO1.ICKEY ,TO1.IVATKEY ,TO1.ICNAME ,TO1.LOGGRPCD ,TO1.ACKEY ,TO1.ACNAME ,TO1.REP_ACKEY ,TO1.REP_ACNAME ,TO1.SUBUL_NAME ) TO1
mapper.select:
SELECT SUM(TTO1.CARRYOVER_QTY) AS CARRYOVER_QTY ,SUM(TTO1.CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE) AS CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE ,SUM(TTO1.ACIB_QTY) AS ACIB_QTY /* 거래처 입고 수량 */ ,SUM(TTO1.ACIB_COSTPRICE) AS ACIB_COSTPRICE /* 거래처 입고 금액 */ ,SUM(TTO1.ACOB_QTY) AS ACOB_QTY /* 거래처 반출 수량 */ ,SUM(TTO1.ACOB_COSTPRICE) AS ACOB_COSTPRICE /* 거래처 반출 금액 */ ,SUM(TTO1.OI_QTY) AS OI_QTY /* 기타 입고 수량 */ ,SUM(TTO1.OI_COSTPRICE) AS OI_COSTPRICE /* 기타 입고 금액 */ ,SUM(TTO1.IBTT_QTY) AS IBTT_QTY /* 입고 수량 합계 */ ,SUM(TTO1.IBTT_COSTPRICE) AS IBTT_COSTPRICE /* 입고 금액 합계 */ ,SUM(TTO1.STOB_QTY) AS STOB_QTY /* 점포 출고 수량 */ ,SUM(TTO1.STOB_COSTPRICE) AS STOB_COSTPRICE /* 점포 출고 금액 */ ,SUM(TTO1.STRI_QTY) AS STRI_QTY /* 점포 반입 수량 */ ,SUM(TTO1.STRI_COSTPRICE) AS STRI_COSTPRICE /* 점포 반입 금액 */ ,SUM(TTO1.STOBTT_QTY) AS STOBTT_QTY /* 점포 출고계 수량 */ ,SUM(TTO1.STOBTT_COSTPRICE) AS STOBTT_COSTPRICE /* 점포 출고계 금액 */ ,SUM(TTO1.STOBTT_SALEPRICE) AS STOBTT_SALEPRICE /* 점포 출고계 매가 */ ,SUM(TTO1.STOBTT_PROFIT) AS STOBTT_PROFIT /* 점포 출고계 이익 */ ,SUM(TTO1.DUOB_QTY) AS DUOB_QTY /* 폐기 수량 */ ,SUM(TTO1.DUOB_COSTPRICE) AS DUOB_COSTPRICE /* 폐기 금액 */ ,SUM(TTO1.DNOB_QTY) AS DNOB_QTY /* 기부 수량 */ ,SUM(TTO1.DNOB_COSTPRICE) AS DNOB_COSTPRICE /* 기부 금액 */ ,SUM(TTO1.DPOB_QTY) AS DPOB_QTY /* 매각 수량 */ ,SUM(TTO1.DPOB_COSTPRICE) AS DPOB_COSTPRICE /* 매각 금액 */ ,SUM(TTO1.OO_QTY) AS OO_QTY /* 기타 출고 수량 */ ,SUM(TTO1.OO_COSTPRICE) AS OO_COSTPRICE /* 기타 출고 금액 */ ,SUM(TTO1.SCO_QTY) AS SCO_QTY /* 자가 소비 수량 */ ,SUM(TTO1.SCO_COSTPRICE) AS SCO_COSTPRICE /* 자가 소비 금액 */ ,SUM(TTO1.IC_REPLACE_QTY) AS IC_REPLACE_QTY /* 상품 대체 수량 */ ,SUM(TTO1.IC_REPLACE_COSTPRICE) AS IC_REPLACE_COSTPRICE /*상품 대체 금액 */ ,SUM(TTO1.OBTT_QTY) AS OBTT_QTY /* 출고 수량 합계 */ ,SUM(TTO1.OBTT_COSTPRICE) AS OBTT_COSTPRICE /* 출고 원가 합계 */ ,SUM(TTO1.OBTT_SALEPRICE) AS OBTT_SALEPRICE /* 출고 매가 합계 */ ,SUM(TTO1.OBTT_PROFIT) AS OBTT_PROFIT /* 출고 합계 이익 */ ,SUM(TTO1.DIFF_TTQTY) AS DIFF_TTQTY /* 상품 차이 수량 */ ,SUM(TTO1.DIFF_TTQTY_COSTPRICE) AS DIFF_TTQTY_COSTPRICE /* 상품 차이 금액 */ ,SUM(TTO1.PRO_CAL_COSTPRICE) AS PRO_CAL_COSTPRICE /* 원가 정산 금액 */ ,SUM(TTO1.IV_CON_QTY) AS IV_CON_QTY /* 재고 반영 수량 */ ,SUM(TTO1.IV_CON_SALEPRICE) AS IV_CON_SALEPRICE /* 재고 반영 매가 */ ,SUM(TTO1.IV_CON_COSTPRICE) AS IV_CON_COSTPRICE /* 재고 반영 원가 */ ,SUM(TTO1.IV_CON_PROFIT) AS IV_CON_PROFIT /* 재고 반영 이익 */ ,SUM(TTO1.NER_OBTT_QTY) AS NER_OBTT_QTY /* 사내 대체 수량 */ ,SUM(TTO1.NER_OBTT_SALEPRICE) AS NER_OBTT_SALEPRICE /* 사내 대체 매가 */ ,SUM(TTO1.NER_OBTT_COSTPRICE) AS NER_OBTT_COSTPRICE /* 사내 대체 원가 */ ,SUM(TTO1.NER_OBTT_PROFIT) AS NER_OBTT_PROFIT /* 사내 대체 이익 */ ,SUM(TTO1.CLOSING_INVQTY) AS CLOSING_INVQTY ,SUM(TTO1.CLOSING_COSTPRICE) AS CLOSING_COSTPRICE FROM(
) TTO1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TWORK_INFO_IVST_YYMM4 ( CHIT_YYMM , CTKEY , ICGRKEY , ICGRNAME , OWKEY , ICKEY , ICNAME , CARRYOVER_QTY , CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE , ACIB_QTY , ACIB_COSTPRICE , ACOB_QTY , ACOB_COSTPRICE , OI_QTY , OI_COSTPRICE , IBTT_QTY , IBTT_COSTPRICE , STOB_QTY , STOB_COSTPRICE , STRI_QTY , STRI_COSTPRICE , STOBTT_QTY , STOBTT_SALEPRICE , STOBTT_COSTPRICE , STOBTT_PROFIT , DUOB_QTY , DUOB_COSTPRICE , DNOB_QTY , DNOB_COSTPRICE , DPOB_QTY , DPOB_COSTPRICE , OO_QTY , OO_COSTPRICE , SCO_QTY , SCO_COSTPRICE , IC_REPLACE_QTY , IC_REPLACE_COSTPRICE , NER_OBTT_QTY , NER_OBTT_SALEPRICE , NER_OBTT_COSTPRICE , NER_OBTT_PROFIT , OBTT_QTY , OBTT_SALEPRICE , OBTT_COSTPRICE , OBTT_PROFIT , DIFF_TTQTY , DIFF_TTQTY_COSTPRICE , PRO_CAL_COSTPRICE , IV_CON_QTY , IV_CON_SALEPRICE , IV_CON_COSTPRICE , IV_CON_PROFIT , CLOSING_INVQTY , CLOSING_COSTPRICE , ACKEY , ACNAME , REP_ACKEY , REP_ACNAME , SUBUL_NAME , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY , LOGGRPCD , AVGCOSTPRICE ) SELECT TO1.SUBUL_YYMM ,TO1.CTKEY ,TO1.ICGRKEY ,TO1.ICGRNAME ,TO1.OWKEY ,TO1.ICKEY ,TO1.ICNAME ,TO1.CARRYOVER_QTY ,TO1.CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE ,TO1.ACIB_QTY /* 거래처 입고 수량 */ ,TO1.ACIB_COSTPRICE /* 거래처 입고 금액 */ ,TO1.ACOB_QTY /* 거래처 반출 수량 */ ,TO1.ACOB_COSTPRICE /* 거래처 반출 금액 */ ,TO1.OI_QTY /* 기타 입고 수량 */ ,TO1.OI_COSTPRICE /* 기타 입고 금액 */ ,TO1.IBTT_QTY /* 입고 수량 합계 */ ,TO1.IBTT_COSTPRICE /* 입고 금액 합계 */ ,TO1.STOB_QTY /* 점포 출고 수량 */ ,TO1.STOB_COSTPRICE /* 점포 출고 금액 */ ,TO1.STRI_QTY /* 점포 반입 수량 */ ,TO1.STRI_COSTPRICE /* 점포 반입 금액 */ ,TO1.STOBTT_QTY /* 점포 출고계 수량 */ ,TO1.STOBTT_SALEPRICE /* 점포 출고계 매가 */ ,TRUNC(TO1.STOBTT_QTY * TO2.AVGCOSTPRICE) AS STOBTT_COSTPRICE /* 점포 출고계 금액 */ ,TO1.STOBTT_COSTPRICE - TRUNC(TO1.STOBTT_QTY * TO2.AVGCOSTPRICE) AS STOBTT_PROFIT /* 점포 출고계 이익 */ ,TO1.DUOB_QTY /* 폐기 수량 */ ,TO1.DUOB_COSTPRICE /* 폐기 금액 */ ,TO1.DNOB_QTY /* 기부 수량 */ ,TO1.DNOB_COSTPRICE /* 기부 금액 */ ,TO1.DPOB_QTY /* 매각 수량 */ ,TO1.DPOB_COSTPRICE /* 매각 금액 */ ,TO1.OO_QTY /* 기타 출고 수량 */ ,TO1.OO_COSTPRICE /* 기타 출고 금액 */ ,TO1.SCO_QTY /* 자가 소비 수량 */ ,TO1.SCO_COSTPRICE /* 자가 소비 금액 */ ,TO1.IC_REPLACE_QTY /* 상품 대체 수량 */ ,TO1.IC_REPLACE_COSTPRICE /*상품 대체 금액 */ ,0 AS NER_OBTT_QTY /* 사내 대체 수량 */ ,0 AS NER_OBTT_SALEPRICE /* 사내 대체 매가 */ ,0 AS NER_OBTT_COSTPRICE /* 사내 대체 원가 */ ,0 AS NER_OBTT_PROFIT /* 사내 대체 이익 */ ,TO1.OBTT_QTY /* 출고 수량 합계 */ ,TO1.OBTT_SALEPRICE /* 출고 매가 합계 */ ,TRUNC(TO1.OBTT_COSTPRICE * TO2.AVGCOSTPRICE) AS OBTT_COSTPRICE /* 출고 원가 합계 */ ,TO1.OBTT_SALEPRICE - TRUNC(TO1.OBTT_COSTPRICE * TO2.AVGCOSTPRICE) AS OBTT_PROFIT /* 출고 합계 이익 */ ,0 AS DIFF_TTQTY /* 상품 차이 수량 */ ,0 AS DIFF_TTQTY_COSTPRICE /* 상품 차이 금액 */ ,TO1.PRO_CAL_COSTPRICE /* 원가 정산 금액 */ ,TO1.IV_CON_QTY /* 재고 반영 수량 */ ,TO1.IV_CON_SALEPRICE /* 재고 반영 매가 */ ,TO1.IV_CON_COSTPRICE /* 재고 반영 원가 */ ,TO1.IV_CON_PROFIT /* 재고 반영 이익 */ ,TO1.CARRYOVER_QTY + TO1.IBTT_QTY - TO1.OBTT_QTY + TO1.IV_CON_QTY AS CLOSING_IVQTY ,TO1.CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE + TO1.IBTT_COSTPRICE - TRUNC(TO1.OBTT_COSTPRICE * TO2.AVGCOSTPRICE) + TO1.IV_CON_COSTPRICE + TO1.PRO_CAL_COSTPRICE AS CLOSING_COSTPRICE ,TO1.ACKEY ,TO1.ACNAME ,TO1.REP_ACKEY ,TO1.REP_ACNAME ,TO1.SUBUL_NAME , #{sysdate} , #{surkey} , #{sysdate} , #{surkey} ,TO1.LOGGRPCD ,TO2.AVGCOSTPRICE FROM ( SELECT TO1.SUBUL_YYMM ,TO1.CTKEY ,TO1.ICGRKEY ,TO1.ICGRNAME ,TO1.OWKEY ,TO1.ICKEY ,TO1.ICNAME ,(CASE WHEN MAX(TO1.CARRYOVER_QTY) > 0 THEN MAX(TO1.CARRYOVER_QTY) ELSE MIN(TO1.CARRYOVER_QTY) END) AS CARRYOVER_QTY ,(CASE WHEN MAX(TO1.CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE) > 0 THEN MAX(TO1.CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE) ELSE MIN(TO1.CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE) END) AS CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE ,SUM(TO1.ACIB_QTY) AS ACIB_QTY /* 거래처 입고 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.ACIB_COSTPRICE) AS ACIB_COSTPRICE /* 거래처 입고 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.ACOB_QTY) AS ACOB_QTY /* 거래처 반출 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.ACOB_COSTPRICE) AS ACOB_COSTPRICE /* 거래처 반출 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.OI_QTY) AS OI_QTY /* 기타 입고 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.OI_COSTPRICE) AS OI_COSTPRICE /* 기타 입고 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.IBTT_QTY) AS IBTT_QTY /* 입고 수량 합계 */ ,SUM(TO1.IBTT_COSTPRICE) AS IBTT_COSTPRICE /* 입고 금액 합계 */ ,SUM(TO1.STOB_QTY) AS STOB_QTY /* 점포 출고 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.STOB_COSTPRICE) AS STOB_COSTPRICE /* 점포 출고 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.STRI_QTY) AS STRI_QTY /* 점포 반입 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.STRI_COSTPRICE) AS STRI_COSTPRICE /* 점포 반입 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.STOBTT_QTY) AS STOBTT_QTY /* 점포 출고계 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.STOBTT_COSTPRICE) AS STOBTT_SALEPRICE /* 점포 출고계 매가 */ ,SUM(TO1.STOBTT_COSTPRICE) AS STOBTT_COSTPRICE /* 점포 출고계 원가 */ ,SUM(TO1.DUOB_QTY) AS DUOB_QTY /* 폐기 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.DUOB_COSTPRICE) AS DUOB_COSTPRICE /* 폐기 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.DNOB_QTY) AS DNOB_QTY /* 기부 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.DNOB_COSTPRICE) AS DNOB_COSTPRICE /* 기부 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.DPOB_QTY) AS DPOB_QTY /* 매각 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.DPOB_COSTPRICE) AS DPOB_COSTPRICE /* 매각 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.OO_QTY) AS OO_QTY /* 기타 출고 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.OO_COSTPRICE) AS OO_COSTPRICE /* 기타 출고 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.SCO_QTY) AS SCO_QTY /* 자가 소비 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.SCO_COSTPRICE) AS SCO_COSTPRICE /* 자가 소비 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.IC_REPLACE_QTY) AS IC_REPLACE_QTY /* 상품 대체 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.IC_REPLACE_COSTPRICE) AS IC_REPLACE_COSTPRICE /*상품 대체 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.OBTT_QTY) AS OBTT_QTY /* 출고 수량 합계 */ ,SUM(TO1.OBTT_SALEPRICE) AS OBTT_SALEPRICE /* 출고 매가 합계 */ ,SUM(TO1.OBTT_COSTPRICE) AS OBTT_COSTPRICE /* 출고 원가 합계 */ ,SUM(TO1.TRUNC_COSTPRICE) AS PRO_CAL_COSTPRICE /* 원가 정산 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.IV_CON_QTY) AS IV_CON_QTY /* 재고 반영 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.IV_CON_SALEPRICE) AS IV_CON_SALEPRICE /* 재고 반영 매가 */ ,SUM(TO1.IV_CON_COSTPRICE) AS IV_CON_COSTPRICE /* 재고 반영 원가 */ ,SUM(TO1.IV_CON_PROFIT) AS IV_CON_PROFIT /* 재고 반영 이익 */ ,FLOOR(CASE WHEN MAX(TO1.CLOSING_INVQTY) > 0 THEN MAX(TO1.CLOSING_INVQTY) ELSE MIN(TO1.CLOSING_INVQTY) END) AS CLOSING_INVQTY ,FLOOR(CASE WHEN MAX(TO1.CLOSING_COSTPRICE) > 0 THEN MAX(TO1.CLOSING_COSTPRICE) ELSE MIN(TO1.CLOSING_COSTPRICE) END) AS CLOSING_COSTPRICE ,TO1.ACKEY ,TO1.ACNAME ,TO1.REP_ACKEY ,TO1.REP_ACNAME ,TO1.SUBUL_NAME ,TO1.LOGGRPCD FROM ( SELECT TT1.SUBUL_YYMM ,TT1.ICGRKEY ,TT1.ICGRNAME ,TT1.CTKEY ,TT1.OWKEY ,TT1.ICKEY ,TT1.ICNAME ,TT1.LOGGRPCD ,TT1.CARRYOVER_QTY ,TT1.CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE ,TT1.ACIB_QTY ,TT1.ACIB_COSTPRICE ,TT1.ACOB_QTY ,TT1.ACOB_COSTPRICE ,TT1.OI_QTY ,TT1.OI_COSTPRICE ,(TT1.ACIB_QTY + TT1.OI_QTY) - TT1.ACOB_QTY AS IBTT_QTY ,TT1.ACIB_COSTPRICE + TT1.OI_COSTPRICE - TT1.ACOB_COSTPRICE AS IBTT_COSTPRICE ,TT1.STOB_QTY ,TT1.STOB_COSTPRICE ,TT1.STRI_QTY ,TT1.STRI_COSTPRICE ,TT1.STOB_QTY - TT1.STRI_QTY + TT1.DUOB_QTY + TT1.DNOB_QTY AS STOBTT_QTY ,TT1.STOB_COSTPRICE - TT1.STRI_COSTPRICE + TT1.DUOB_COSTPRICE + TT1.DNOB_COSTPRICE AS STOBTT_COSTPRICE ,TT1.STOB_SALEPRICE - TT1.STRI_SALEPRICE + TT1.DUOB_SALEPRICE + TT1.DNOB_SALEPRICE AS STOBTT_SALEPRICE ,(TT1.STOB_SALEPRICE - TT1.STRI_SALEPRICE + TT1.DUOB_COSTPRICE + TT1.DNOB_COSTPRICE) - (TT1.STOB_SALEPRICE - TT1.STRI_SALEPRICE + TT1.DUOB_SALEPRICE + TT1.DNOB_SALEPRICE) AS STOBTT_PROFIT ,TT1.DUOB_QTY ,TT1.DUOB_COSTPRICE ,TT1.DNOB_QTY ,TT1.DNOB_COSTPRICE ,TT1.DPOB_QTY ,TT1.DPOB_COSTPRICE ,TT1.OO_QTY ,TT1.OO_COSTPRICE ,TT1.SCO_QTY ,TT1.SCO_COSTPRICE ,TT1.IC_REPLACE_QTY ,TT1.IC_REPLACE_COSTPRICE ,(TT1.STOB_QTY - TT1.STRI_QTY + TT1.DUOB_QTY + TT1.DNOB_QTY) AS NER_OBTT_QTY ,(TT1.STOB_COSTPRICE - TT1.STRI_COSTPRICE + TT1.DUOB_COSTPRICE + TT1.DNOB_COSTPRICE) AS NER_OBTT_COSTPRICE ,(TT1.STOB_QTY - TT1.STRI_QTY + TT1.SCO_QTY + TT1.OO_QTY + TT1.DUOB_QTY + TT1.DNOB_QTY + TT1.DPOB_QTY + (TT1.IC_REPLACE_QTY * -1)) AS OBTT_QTY ,(TT1.STOB_COSTPRICE - TT1.STRI_COSTPRICE + TT1.SCO_COSTPRICE + TT1.OO_COSTPRICE + TT1.DUOB_COSTPRICE + TT1.DNOB_COSTPRICE + TT1.DPOB_COSTPRICE + (TT1.IC_REPLACE_COSTPRICE * -1)) AS OBTT_SALEPRICE ,(TT1.STOB_QTY - TT1.STRI_QTY + TT1.SCO_QTY + TT1.OO_QTY + TT1.DUOB_QTY + TT1.DNOB_QTY + TT1.DPOB_QTY + (TT1.IC_REPLACE_QTY * -1)) AS OBTT_COSTPRICE ,TT1.TRUNC_COSTPRICE /* 원가 정산 금액 */ ,TT1.IV_CON_QTY /* 재고 반영 수량 */ ,TT1.IV_CON_SALEPRICE /* 재고 반영 매가 */ ,TT1.IV_CON_COSTPRICE /* 재고 반영 금액 */ ,TT1.IV_CON_PROFIT /* 재고 반영 이익 */ ,TT1.ACKEY ,TT1.ACNAME ,TT1.REP_ACKEY ,TT1.REP_ACNAME ,TT1.SUBUL_NAME ,TT1.CLOSING_INVQTY ,TT1.CLOSING_COSTPRICE ,TT1.INSERTDATE ,TT1.INSERTURKEY ,TT1.UPDATEDATE ,TT1.UPDATEURKEY FROM ( SELECT SUBSTR(#{subulymd},1,6) AS SUBUL_YYMM ,A.ICGRKEY ,E.ICGRNAME ,A.CTKEY ,A.OWKEY ,B.ICKEY ,B.ICNAME ,A.LOGGRPCD ,COALESCE(C.CARRYOVER_QTY, 0) AS CARRYOVER_QTY ,COALESCE(C.CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE, 0) AS CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '10' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '100' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '200') THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS ACIB_QTY /* 거래처 입고 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '10' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '100' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '200') THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS ACIB_COSTPRICE /* 거래처 입고 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '40' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '90' THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS ACOB_QTY /* 거래처 반출 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '40' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '90' THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS ACOB_COSTPRICE /* 거래처 반출 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IB' AND
