(A.ORHDTYPE = '60' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '90' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '180' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '120') THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS OI_QTY /* 기타 입고 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '60' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '90' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '180' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '120') THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS OI_COSTPRICE /* 기타 입고 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '10' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '20' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '30' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '60' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '70' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '910' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '200' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '300' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '310') THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS STOB_QTY /* 점포 출고 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '10' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '20' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '30' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '60' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '70' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '910' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '200' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '300' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '310') THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS STOB_COSTPRICE /* 점포 출고 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '50' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '950' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '190') THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS STRI_QTY /* 점포 반입 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '50' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '950' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '190') THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS STRI_COSTPRICE /* 점포 반입 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '10' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '20' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '30' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '40' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '50' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '60' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '70' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '910' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '200') THEN A.TTQTY_SALEPRICE ELSE 0 END AS STOB_SALEPRICE /* 점포 출고 매가 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '50' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '950') THEN A.TTQTY_SALEPRICE ELSE 0 END AS STRI_SALEPRICE /* 점포 반입 매가 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '120' THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS DUOB_QTY /* 폐기 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '120' THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS DUOB_COSTPRICE /* 폐기 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '120' THEN A.TTQTY_SALEPRICE ELSE 0 END AS DUOB_SALEPRICE /* 폐기 매가 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '110' THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS DNOB_QTY /* 기부 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '110' THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS DNOB_COSTPRICE /* 기부 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '110' THEN A.TTQTY_SALEPRICE ELSE 0 END AS DNOB_SALEPRICE /* 기부 매가 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '130' THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS DPOB_QTY /* 매각 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '130' THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS DPOB_COSTPRICE /* 매각 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '50' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '80' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '100' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '140' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '180' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '50') THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS OO_QTY /* 기타 출고 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '50' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '80' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '100' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '140' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '180' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '50') THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS OO_COSTPRICE /* 기타 출고 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '190' THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS SCO_QTY /* 자가 소비 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '190' THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS SCO_COSTPRICE /* 자가 소비 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '018' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '019') THEN A.CLOSING_INVQTY ELSE 0 END AS IC_REPLACE_QTY /* 상품 대체 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '018' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '019') THEN A.CLOSING_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS IC_REPLACE_COSTPRICE /* 상품 대체 금액 */ ,A.TRUNC_COSTPRICE /* 원가 정산 금액 */ ,0 AS DIFF_TTQTY /* 상품 차이 수량 */ ,0 AS DIFF_TTQTY_COSTPRICE /* 상품 차이 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '70' THEN A.CLOSING_INVQTY ELSE 0 END AS IV_CON_QTY /* 재고 반영 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '70' THEN A.CLOSING_SALEPRICE ELSE 0 END AS IV_CON_SALEPRICE /* 재고 반영 매가 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '70' THEN A.CLOSING_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS IV_CON_COSTPRICE /* 재고 반영 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '70' THEN A.CLOSING_SALEPRICE - A.CLOSING_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS IV_CON_PROFIT /* 재고 반영 이익 */ ,B.ACKEY ,F.ACNAME ,(SELECT REP_ACKEY FROM TWORK_MST_AC WHERE CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND ACKEY = B.ACKEY AND OWKEY = B.OWKEY) AS REP_ACKEY ,(SELECT ACNAME FROM TWORK_MST_AC WHERE OWKEY = #{owkey} AND CTKEY = A.CTKEY AND ACKEY = (SELECT REP_ACKEY FROM TWORK_MST_AC WHERE CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND ACKEY = B.ACKEY AND OWKEY = B.OWKEY) ) AS REP_ACNAME ,(SELECT CTGNAME FROM TWORK_MST_CTG WHERE CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND CTGKEY = (SELECT UPPERCTGKEY FROM TWORK_MST_CTG WHERE CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND CTGKEY = (SELECT UPPERCTGKEY FROM TWORK_MST_CTG WHERE CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND CTGKEY = B.CTGKEY AND CTGLEVEL = '3') AND CTGLEVEL = '2' ) ) AS SUBUL_NAME ,(CASE WHEN D.CLOSING_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN A.CLOSING_INVQTY ELSE 0 END) AS CLOSING_INVQTY ,(CASE WHEN D.CLOSING_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN A.CLOSING_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END) AS CLOSING_COSTPRICE ,A.INSERTDATE ,A.INSERTURKEY ,A.UPDATEDATE ,A.UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_IVST1 A INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = B.ICKEY LEFT JOIN (SELECT 'IV' AS CLOSING_TYPE ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{subulymd},1,6) || '01','YYYYMMDD') - 2,'YYYYMMDD') || '150000' AS CLOSING_DATE ,CTKEY ,OWKEY ,ICKEY ,ICGRKEY ,LOGGRPCD ,'UNK' AS ORHDTYPE ,SUM(CLOSING_INVQTY) AS CARRYOVER_QTY ,SUM(CLOSING_COSTPRICE) AS CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE FROM TWORK_INFO_IVST_YYMM4 WHERE CHIT_YYMM = TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{subulymd},1,6) || '01','YYYYMMDD') - 1,'YYYYMM') AND CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} GROUP BY CTKEY ,OWKEY ,ICKEY ,ICGRKEY ,LOGGRPCD ) C ON A.CLOSING_TYPE = C.CLOSING_TYPE AND A.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = C.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = C.ICKEY AND A.ICGRKEY = C.ICGRKEY AND A.LOGGRPCD = C.LOGGRPCD AND A.ORHDTYPE = C.ORHDTYPE LEFT JOIN (SELECT CLOSING_TYPE ,MAX(CLOSING_DATE) AS CLOSING_DATE ,CTKEY ,OWKEY ,ICKEY ,LOGGRPCD ,ORHDTYPE FROM TWORK_INFO_IVST1 WHERE CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND CLOSING_DATE BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{subulymd},1,6) || '01','YYYYMMDD') - 1,'YYYYMMDD') || '150000' AND TO_CHAR(TO_DATE((DATE_TRUNC('month', #{subulymd}::DATE) + INTERVAL '1 month - 1 day')::DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') - 1,'YYYYMMDD') || '150000' AND CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} AND ORHDTYPE = 'UNK' GROUP BY CLOSING_TYPE ,CTKEY ,OWKEY ,ICKEY ,LOGGRPCD ,ORHDTYPE ) D ON A.CLOSING_TYPE = D.CLOSING_TYPE AND A.CLOSING_DATE = D.CLOSING_DATE AND A.CTKEY = D.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = D.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = D.ICKEY AND A.LOGGRPCD = D.LOGGRPCD AND A.ORHDTYPE = D.ORHDTYPE INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICGR E ON A.CTKEY = E.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = E.OWKEY AND A.ICGRKEY = E.ICGRKEY AND A.ICGRTYPE = E.ICGRTYPE INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_AC F ON B.CTKEY = F.CTKEY AND B.ACKEY = F.ACKEY AND B.OWKEY = F.OWKEY WHERE 1=1 AND A.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND (( A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '10' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '20' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '910' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '200' OR A.CHITYMD IS NOT NULL) AND A.CHITYMD BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{subulymd},1,6) || '01','YYYYMMDD'),'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(TO_DATE((DATE_TRUNC('month', #{subulymd}::DATE) + INTERVAL '1 month - 1 day')::DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYYMMDD')) OR (A.CLOSING_TYPE IN ('IB', 'IV') AND (A.ORHDTYPE <> '50' AND A.ORHDTYPE <> '950') AND A.CLOSING_DATE BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{subulymd},1,6) || '01','YYYYMMDD') - 1,'YYYYMMDD') || '150000' AND TO_CHAR(TO_DATE((DATE_TRUNC('month', #{subulymd}::DATE) + INTERVAL '1 month - 1 day')::DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYYMMDD') || '145959') OR (A.CLOSING_TYPE IN ('IB', 'IV') AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '50' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '950') AND A.CHITYMD BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{subulymd},1,6) || '01','YYYYMMDD'),'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(TO_DATE((DATE_TRUNC('month', #{subulymd}::DATE) + INTERVAL '1 month - 1 day')::DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYYMMDD')) OR (A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE <> '10' AND A.ORHDTYPE <> '20' AND A.ORHDTYPE <> '910' AND A.ORHDTYPE <> '200' AND A.CHITYMD IS NULL) AND A.CLOSING_DATE BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{subulymd},1,6) || '01','YYYYMMDD') - 1,'YYYYMMDD') || '150000' AND TO_CHAR(TO_DATE((DATE_TRUNC('month', #{subulymd}::DATE) + INTERVAL '1 month - 1 day')::DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYYMMDD') || '145959')) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT CNTR.ICKEY FROM TWORK_MST_CNTR CNTR WHERE A.CTKEY = CNTR.CTKEY AND A.ICKEY = CNTR.ICKEY AND A.OWKEY = CNTR.OWKEY ) AND A.CTKEY = E.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = E.OWKEY AND A.ICGRKEY = E.ICGRKEY AND A.ICGRTYPE = E.ICGRTYPE AND B.CTKEY = F.CTKEY AND B.ACKEY = F.ACKEY AND B.OWKEY = F.OWKEY ) TT1 ) TO1 GROUP BY TO1.SUBUL_YYMM ,TO1.ICGRKEY ,TO1.ICGRNAME ,TO1.CTKEY ,TO1.OWKEY ,TO1.ICKEY ,TO1.ICNAME ,TO1.LOGGRPCD ,TO1.ACKEY ,TO1.ACNAME ,TO1.REP_ACKEY ,TO1.REP_ACNAME ,TO1.SUBUL_NAME ) TO1 ,(SELECT CTKEY ,OWKEY ,SUBSTR(#{subulymd},1,6) AS CLOSING_DATE ,LOGGRPCD ,ICKEY ,ICGRKEY ,MAX(AVGCOSTPRICE) AS AVGCOSTPRICE FROM TWORK_MST_AVGCOST2 WHERE CLOSING_DATE = TO_CHAR(TO_DATE((DATE_TRUNC('month', #{subulymd}::DATE) + INTERVAL '1 month - 1 day')::DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') - 1,'YYYYMMDD') || '150000' AND CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} GROUP BY CTKEY ,OWKEY ,LOGGRPCD ,ICKEY ,ICGRKEY) TO2 WHERE TO1.CTKEY = TO2.CTKEY AND TO1.OWKEY = TO2.OWKEY AND TO1.SUBUL_YYMM = TO2.CLOSING_DATE AND TO1.LOGGRPCD = TO2.LOGGRPCD AND TO1.ICKEY = TO2.ICKEY AND TO1.ICGRKEY = TO2.ICGRKEY

INSERT INTO TWORK_INFO_IVST_YYMM2( SUBUL_YYMM , CTKEY , CNTRKEY , CNTRNAME , OWKEY , ICKEY , CARRYOVER_QTY , CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE , IB_QTY , IB_COSTPRICE , OI_QTY , OI_COSTPRICE , RO_QTY , RO_COSTPRICE , IBTT_QTY , IBTT_COSTPRICE , OB_QTY , OB_COSTPRICE , RI_QTY , RI_COSTPRICE , OO_QTY , OO_COSTPRICE , OBTT_QTY , OBTT_COSTPRICE , IV_CON_QTY , IV_CON_COSTPRICE , CLOSING_INVQTY , CLOSING_COSTPRICE , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY , LOGGRPCD ) SELECT TO1.SUBUL_YYMM ,TO1.CTKEY ,TO1.CNTRKEY ,TO1.CNTRNAME ,TO1.OWKEY ,TO1.ICKEY ,TRUNC(CASE WHEN MAX(TO1.CARRYOVER_QTY) > 0 THEN MAX(TO1.CARRYOVER_QTY) ELSE MIN(TO1.CARRYOVER_QTY) END) AS CARRYOVER_QTY /* 기초 재고 수량 */ ,TRUNC(CASE WHEN MAX(TO1.CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE) > 0 THEN MAX(TO1.CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE) ELSE MIN(TO1.CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE) END) AS CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE /* 기초 재고 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.IB_QTY) AS IB_QTY /* 입고 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.IB_COSTPRICE) AS IB_COSTPRICE /* 입고 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.OI_QTY) AS OI_QTY /* 기타 입고 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.OI_COSTPRICE) AS OI_COSTPRICE /* 기타 입고 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.RO_QTY) AS RO_QTY /* 반품 출고 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.RO_COSTPRICE) AS RO_COSTPRICE /* 반품 출고 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.IBTT_QTY) AS IBTT_QTY /* 입고 수량 합계 */ ,SUM(TO1.IBTT_COSTPRICE) AS IBTT_COSTPRICE /* 입고 금액 합계 */ ,SUM(TO1.OB_QTY) AS OB_QTY /* 출고 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.OB_COSTPRICE) AS OB_COSTPRICE /* 출고 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.RI_QTY) AS RI_QTY /* 반품 입고 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.RI_COSTPRICE) AS RI_COSTPRICE /* 반품 입고 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.OO_QTY) AS OO_QTY /* 기타 출고 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.OO_COSTPRICE) AS OO_COSTPRICE /* 기타 출고 금액 */ ,SUM(TO1.OBTT_QTY) AS OBTT_QTY /* 출고 수량 합계 */ ,SUM(TO1.OBTT_COSTPRICE) AS OBTT_COSTPRICE /* 출고 금액 합계 */ ,SUM(TO1.IV_CON_QTY) AS IV_CON_QTY /* 재고 조사 반영 수량 */ ,SUM(TO1.IV_CON_COSTPRICE) AS IV_CON_COSTPRICE /* 재고 조사 반영 원가 */ ,TRUNC(CASE WHEN MAX(TO1.CLOSING_INVQTY) > 0 THEN MAX(TO1.CLOSING_INVQTY) ELSE MIN(TO1.CLOSING_INVQTY) END) AS CLOSING_INVQTY /* 기말 재고 수량 */ ,TRUNC(CASE WHEN MAX(TO1.CLOSING_COSTPRICE) > 0 THEN MAX(TO1.CLOSING_COSTPRICE) ELSE MIN(TO1.CLOSING_COSTPRICE) END) AS CLOSING_COSTPRICE /* 기말 재고 금액 */ , #{sysdate} , #{surkey} , #{sysdate} , #{surkey} ,TO1.LOGGRPCD FROM( SELECT TT1.SUBUL_YYMM ,TT1.CTKEY ,TT1.CNTRKEY ,TT1.CNTRNAME ,TT1.OWKEY ,TT1.ICKEY ,TT1.CARRYOVER_QTY ,TT1.CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE ,TT1.IB_QTY ,TT1.IB_COSTPRICE ,TT1.OI_QTY ,TT1.OI_COSTPRICE ,TT1.RO_QTY ,TT1.RO_COSTPRICE ,(TT1.IB_QTY + TT1.OI_QTY) - TT1.RO_QTY AS IBTT_QTY ,(TT1.IB_COSTPRICE) + (TT1.OI_COSTPRICE) - (TT1.RO_COSTPRICE) AS IBTT_COSTPRICE ,TT1.OB_QTY ,TT1.OB_COSTPRICE ,TT1.RI_QTY ,TT1.RI_COSTPRICE ,TT1.OO_QTY ,TT1.OO_COSTPRICE ,(TT1.OB_QTY + TT1.OO_QTY) - TT1.RI_QTY AS OBTT_QTY ,(TT1.OB_COSTPRICE) - (TT1.RI_COSTPRICE) + (TT1.OO_COSTPRICE) AS OBTT_COSTPRICE ,TT1.IV_CON_QTY ,TT1.IV_CON_COSTPRICE ,TT1.CLOSING_INVQTY ,TT1.CLOSING_COSTPRICE ,TT1.INSERTDATE ,TT1.INSERTURKEY ,TT1.UPDATEDATE ,TT1.UPDATEURKEY ,TT1.LOGGRPCD FROM( SELECT SUBSTR(#{subulymd},1,6) AS SUBUL_YYMM ,A.CTKEY ,B.CNTRKEY ,B.CNTRNAME ,A.OWKEY ,A.ICKEY ,COALESCE(C.CARRYOVER_QTY, 0) AS CARRYOVER_QTY ,COALESCE(C.CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE, 0) AS CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '10' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '100') THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS IB_QTY /* 입고 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '10' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '100') THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS IB_COSTPRICE /* 입고 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '60' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '90' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '180' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '120') THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS OI_QTY /* 기타 입고 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '60' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '90' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '180' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '120') THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS OI_COSTPRICE /* 기타 입고 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '40' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '90') THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS RO_QTY /* 반품 출고 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '40' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '90') THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS RO_COSTPRICE /* 반품 출고 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '10' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '20' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '30' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '50' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '60' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '70' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '910' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '200' ) THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS OB_QTY /* 출고 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '10' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '20' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '30' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '50' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '60' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '70' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '910' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '200') THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS OB_COSTPRICE /* 출고 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '50' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '950') THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS RI_QTY /* 반품 입고 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '50' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '950') THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS RI_COSTPRICE /* 반품 입고 금액 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '80' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '100' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '140' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '180' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '50') THEN A.TTQTY ELSE 0 END AS OO_QTY /* 기타 출고 수량 */ ,CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND (A.ORHDTYPE = '80' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '100' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '140' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '180' OR A.ORHDTYPE = '50') THEN A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END AS OO_COSTPRICE /* 기타 출고 금액 */ ,TRUNC(CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '70' THEN A.CLOSING_INVQTY ELSE 0 END) AS IV_CON_QTY /* 재고 반영 수량 */ ,TRUNC(CASE WHEN A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND A.ORHDTYPE = '70' THEN A.CLOSING_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END) AS IV_CON_COSTPRICE /* 재고 반영 금액 */ ,(CASE WHEN D.CLOSING_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN A.CLOSING_INVQTY ELSE 0 END) AS CLOSING_INVQTY ,(CASE WHEN D.CLOSING_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN A.CLOSING_COSTPRICE ELSE 0 END) AS CLOSING_COSTPRICE ,A.INSERTDATE ,A.INSERTURKEY ,A.UPDATEDATE ,A.UPDATEURKEY ,A.LOGGRPCD FROM TWORK_INFO_IVST1 A INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CNTR B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = B.ICKEY LEFT JOIN (SELECT CLOSING_TYPE ,CLOSING_DATE ,CTKEY ,OWKEY ,ICKEY ,LOGGRPCD ,ORHDTYPE ,CLOSING_INVQTY AS CARRYOVER_QTY ,CLOSING_COSTPRICE AS CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE FROM TWORK_INFO_IVST1 WHERE CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND CLOSING_DATE = TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{subulymd},1,6) || '01','YYYYMMDD') - 2,'YYYYMMDD') || '150000' AND CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} ) C ON A.CLOSING_TYPE = C.CLOSING_TYPE AND A.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = C.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = C.ICKEY AND A.LOGGRPCD = C.LOGGRPCD AND A.ORHDTYPE = C.ORHDTYPE LEFT JOIN (SELECT CLOSING_TYPE ,MAX(CLOSING_DATE) AS CLOSING_DATE ,CTKEY ,OWKEY ,ICKEY ,LOGGRPCD ,ORHDTYPE FROM TWORK_INFO_IVST1 WHERE CLOSING_TYPE = 'IV' AND ORHDTYPE = 'UNK' AND CLOSING_DATE BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{subulymd},1,6) || '01','YYYYMMDD') - 1,'YYYYMMDD') || '150000' AND TO_CHAR(TO_DATE((DATE_TRUNC('month', #{subulymd}::DATE) + INTERVAL '1 month - 1 day')::DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') - 1,'YYYYMMDD') || '150000' AND CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} GROUP BY CLOSING_TYPE ,CTKEY ,OWKEY ,ICKEY ,LOGGRPCD ,ORHDTYPE ) D ON A.CLOSING_TYPE = D.CLOSING_TYPE AND A.CLOSING_DATE = D.CLOSING_DATE AND A.CTKEY = D.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = D.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = D.ICKEY AND A.LOGGRPCD = D.LOGGRPCD AND A.ORHDTYPE = D.ORHDTYPE WHERE A.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.CLOSING_DATE BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{subulymd},1,6) || '01','YYYYMMDD') - 1,'YYYYMMDD') || '150000' AND TO_CHAR(TO_DATE((DATE_TRUNC('month', #{subulymd}::DATE) + INTERVAL '1 month - 1 day')::DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') - 1,'YYYYMMDD') || '150000' ) TT1 ) TO1 GROUP BY TO1.SUBUL_YYMM ,TO1.CTKEY ,TO1.LOGGRPCD ,TO1.CNTRKEY ,TO1.CNTRNAME ,TO1.OWKEY ,TO1.ICKEY

INSERT INTO TWORK_INFO_IVST_YYMM3( SUBUL_YYMM , CTKEY , LOGGRPCD , LOGGRPCD_DESC , ICGRKEY , ICGRNAME , STORE_KEY , STORE_NAME , OWKEY , OB_COSTPRICE , RI_COSTPRICE , TT_COSTPRICE , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT TT1.SUBUL_YYMM ,TT1.CTKEY ,TT1.LOGGRPCD ,TT1.LOGGRPCDNAME ,TT1.ICGRKEY ,TT1.ICGRNAME ,TT1.STORE_KEY ,TT1.STORE_NAME ,TT1.OWKEY ,SUM(TT1.OB_COSTPRICE) AS OB_COSTPRICE ,SUM(TT1.RI_COSTPRICE) AS RI_COSTPRICE ,SUM(TT1.OB_COSTPRICE) - SUM(TT1.RI_COSTPRICE) AS TT_COSTPRICE , #{sysdate} , #{surkey} , #{sysdate} , #{surkey} FROM( SELECT SUBSTR(#{subulymd},1,6) AS SUBUL_YYMM ,A.CTKEY ,A.LOGGRPCD ,D.LOGGRPCDNAME ,A.ICGRKEY ,B.ICGRNAME ,A.STORE_KEY ,C.STORE_NAME ,A.OWKEY ,0 AS OB_COSTPRICE ,A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE AS RI_COSTPRICE ,0 AS TTQTY_COSTPRICE FROM TWORK_INFO_IVST1 A INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICGR B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.ICGRKEY = B.ICGRKEY AND A.ICGRTYPE = B.ICGRTYPE LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_STORE C ON A.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND A.STORE_KEY = C.STORE_KEY AND A.DCKEY = C.DCKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_LOGGRPCD D ON A.CTKEY = D.CTKEY AND A.LOGGRPCD = D.LOGGRPCD WHERE A.CLOSING_DATE BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{subulymd},1,6) || '01','YYYYMMDD') - 1,'YYYYMMDD') || '150000' AND TO_CHAR(TO_DATE((DATE_TRUNC('month', #{subulymd}::DATE) + INTERVAL '1 month - 1 day')::DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') - 1,'YYYYMMDD') || '150000' AND A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'IB' AND A.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.ORHDTYPE IN ('50', '950') AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT CNTR.ICKEY FROM TWORK_MST_CNTR CNTR WHERE A.CTKEY = CNTR.CTKEY AND A.ICKEY = CNTR.ICKEY AND A.OWKEY = CNTR.OWKEY ) /* B, C, D join conditions moved to FROM clause */ UNION ALL SELECT SUBSTR(#{subulymd},1,6) AS SUBUL_YYMM ,A.CTKEY ,A.LOGGRPCD ,D.LOGGRPCDNAME ,A.ICGRKEY ,B.ICGRNAME ,A.STORE_KEY ,C.STORE_NAME ,A.OWKEY ,A.TTQTY_COSTPRICE AS OB_COSTPRICE ,0 AS RI_COSTPRICE ,0 AS TTQTY_COSTPRICE FROM TWORK_INFO_IVST1 A INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICGR B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.ICGRKEY = B.ICGRKEY AND A.ICGRTYPE = B.ICGRTYPE LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_STORE C ON A.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND A.STORE_KEY = C.STORE_KEY AND A.DCKEY = C.DCKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_LOGGRPCD D ON A.CTKEY = D.CTKEY AND A.LOGGRPCD = D.LOGGRPCD WHERE A.CLOSING_DATE BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{subulymd},1,6) || '01','YYYYMMDD') - 1,'YYYYMMDD') || '150000' AND TO_CHAR(TO_DATE((DATE_TRUNC('month', #{subulymd}::DATE) + INTERVAL '1 month - 1 day')::DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') - 1,'YYYYMMDD') || '150000' AND A.CLOSING_TYPE = 'OB' AND A.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.ORHDTYPE IN('10','20','30','60','70','200','910') AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT CNTR.ICKEY FROM TWORK_MST_CNTR CNTR WHERE A.CTKEY = CNTR.CTKEY AND A.ICKEY = CNTR.ICKEY AND A.OWKEY = CNTR.OWKEY ) /* B, C, D join conditions moved to FROM clause */ ) TT1 GROUP BY TT1.SUBUL_YYMM ,TT1.CTKEY ,TT1.LOGGRPCD ,TT1.LOGGRPCDNAME ,TT1.ICGRKEY ,TT1.ICGRNAME ,TT1.STORE_KEY ,TT1.STORE_NAME ,TT1.OWKEY
